# App Builder | Kilo Code Docs

[跳转到主要内容](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/appbuilder#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

目录

Kilo's **App Builder** lets you create end-to-end applications through natural language conversation. Describe what you want to build, watch it come to life in a real-time preview, and deploy directly from your Kilo dashboard. No local environment setup required.

* * *

What App Builder Enables[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/appbuilder#what-app-builder-enables "What App Builder Enables的链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   Build complete applications through conversation with AI
*   Live preview that updates as your app takes shape
*   One-click deployment to production
*   Iterative refinement through natural language feedback
*   Export code to continue development locally or in Cloud Agents

* * *

Prerequisites[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/appbuilder#prerequisites "Prerequisites的链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Before using App Builder:

*   **Active Kilo Code account**  
    Sign up or log in at [app.kilo.ai](https://app.kilo.ai/)
    

* * *

Cost[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/appbuilder#cost "Cost的链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   You pay only for the AI model usage via Kilo Code credits
*   Credit consumption varies based on app complexity and number of iterations
*   Deployment hosting is included during limited launch period

* * *

How to Use[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/appbuilder#how-to-use "How to Use的链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1.  Navigate to **[App Builder](https://app.kilo.ai/app-builder)
    ** from your Kilo dashboard.
2.  Choose an **AI Model** for development (e.g., Grok Code Fast 1, Claude Sonnet 4.5, GPT-5.2).
3.  Describe your application in plain language:
    *   What it should do
    *   Key features and functionality
    *   Design preferences or constraints
4.  Watch the **live preview** update as the AI generates your app.
5.  Provide feedback to refine:
    *   "Make the header sticky"
    *   "Add a dark mode toggle"
    *   "Connect this form to a database"
6.  When satisfied, click **Deploy** to push your app live.

* * *

How App Builder Works[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/appbuilder#how-app-builder-works "How App Builder Works的链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   When you describe your application:
    
    1.  The AI model interprets your requirements and generates an initial implementation.
    2.  Code is rendered in real-time in the live preview panel.
    3.  You can interact with the preview as if it were the deployed app.
    4.  Each refinement request triggers targeted updates to the codebase.
    5.  The AI maintains context across your entire conversation for coherent iteration.
*   Deployment packages your application and provisions hosting automatically.
    

* * *

Example Application Types[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/appbuilder#example-application-types "Example Application Types的链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Web Applications[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/appbuilder#web-applications "Web Applications的链接")

*   Landing pages and marketing sites
*   Dashboards and admin panels
*   SaaS products and internal tools
*   Portfolio sites and blogs

### Interactive Tools[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/appbuilder#interactive-tools "Interactive Tools的链接")

*   Calculators and converters
*   Form builders and survey tools
*   Data visualization apps
*   Productivity utilities

Anything that can be supported by a Next.js app can be built with App Builder!

* * *

Perfect For[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/appbuilder#perfect-for "Perfect For的链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

App Builder is ideal for:

*   **Founders validating ideas quickly** without hiring developers
*   **Developers prototyping** before committing to full implementation
*   **Teams building internal tools** without diverting engineering resources
*   **Designers bringing concepts to life** with functional code
*   **Anyone with an app idea** but limited coding experience
*   **Hackathons and rapid experimentation** where speed matters

* * *

Limitations and Guidance[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/appbuilder#limitations-and-guidance "Limitations and Guidance的链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   Complex enterprise applications may require additional development outside App Builder.
*   Some advanced integrations (e.g., specific third-party APIs) may need manual configuration.
*   Live preview reflects most changes instantly, but some updates may require a brief rebuild.

*   [What App Builder Enables](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/appbuilder#what-app-builder-enables)
    
*   [Prerequisites](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/appbuilder#prerequisites)
    
*   [Cost](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/appbuilder#cost)
    
*   [How to Use](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/appbuilder#how-to-use)
    
*   [How App Builder Works](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/appbuilder#how-app-builder-works)
    
*   [Example Application Types](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/appbuilder#example-application-types)
    *   [Web Applications](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/appbuilder#web-applications)
        
    *   [Interactive Tools](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/appbuilder#interactive-tools)
        
*   [Perfect For](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/appbuilder#perfect-for)
    
*   [Limitations and Guidance](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/appbuilder#limitations-and-guidance)
    

* * *

Is this documentation incorrect or incomplete? [Report an issue on GitHub](https://github.com/Kilo-Org/kilocode/tree/main/apps/kilocode-docs/issues/new?title=Documentation%20Issue:%20%2Fdocs%2Fzh-CN%2Fadvanced-usage%2Fappbuilder)

# Agent Manager | Kilo Code Docs

[跳转到主要内容](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/agent-manager#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

目录

The Agent Manager is a dedicated control panel for running and supervising Kilo Code agents as interactive CLI processes. It supports:

*   Local sessions
*   Resuming existing sessions
*   Parallel Mode (with support for Git worktree) for safe, isolated changes
*   Viewing and continuing cloud-synced sessions filtered to your current repository

This page reflects the actual implementation in the extension.

Prerequisites[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/agent-manager#prerequisites "Prerequisites的链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   Install/update the Kilo Code CLI (latest) — see [CLI setup](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/cli)
    
*   Open a project in VS Code (workspace required)
*   Authentication: You must be logged in via the extension settings OR use CLI with kilocode as provider (see [Authentication Requirements](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/agent-manager#authentication-requirements)
    )

Opening the Agent Manager[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/agent-manager#opening-the-agent-manager "Opening the Agent Manager的链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   Command Palette: “Kilo Code: Open Agent Manager”
*   Or use the title/menu entry if available in your Kilo Code UI

The panel opens as a webview and stays active across focus changes.

Sending messages, approvals, and control[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/agent-manager#sending-messages-approvals-and-control "Sending messages, approvals, and control的链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   Continue the conversation: Send a follow-up message to the running agent
*   Approvals: If the agent asks to use a tool, run a command, launch the browser, or connect to an MCP server, the UI shows an approval prompt
    *   Approve or reject, optionally adding a short note
*   Cancel vs Stop
    *   Cancel sends a structured cancel message to the running process (clean cooperative stop)
    *   Stop force-terminates the underlying CLI process, updating status to “stopped”

Resuming an existing session[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/agent-manager#resuming-an-existing-session "Resuming an existing session的链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

You can continue a session later (local or remote):

*   If a session is not currently running, the Agent Manager will spawn a new CLI process attached to that session’s ID
*   Labels from the original session are preserved whenever possible
*   Your first follow-up message becomes the continuation input

Parallel Mode[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/agent-manager#parallel-mode "Parallel Mode的链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Parallel Mode runs the agent in an isolated Git worktree branch, keeping your main branch clean.

*   Enable the "Parallel Mode" toggle before starting
*   The extension prevents using Parallel Mode inside an existing worktree
    *   Open the main repository (where .git is a directory) to use this feature

### Worktree Location[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/agent-manager#worktree-location "Worktree Location的链接")

Worktrees are created in `.kilocode/worktrees/` within your project directory. This folder is automatically excluded from git via `.git/info/exclude` (a local-only ignore file that doesn't require a commit).

    your-project/├── .git/│   └── info/│       └── exclude   # local ignore rules (includes .kilocode/worktrees/)├── .kilocode/│   └── worktrees/│       └── feature-branch-1234567890/   # isolated working directory└── ...

### While Running[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/agent-manager#while-running "While Running的链接")

The Agent Manager surfaces:

*   Branch name created/used
*   Worktree path
*   A completion/merge instruction message when the agent finishes

### After Completion[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/agent-manager#after-completion "After Completion的链接")

*   The worktree is cleaned up automatically, but the branch is preserved
*   Review the branch in your VCS UI
*   Merge or cherry-pick the changes as desired

### Resuming Sessions[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/agent-manager#resuming-sessions "Resuming Sessions的链接")

If you resume a Parallel Mode session later, the extension will:

1.  Reuse the existing worktree if it still exists
2.  Or recreate it from the session's branch

Authentication Requirements[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/agent-manager#authentication-requirements "Authentication Requirements的链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The Agent Manager requires proper authentication for full functionality, including session syncing and cloud features.

### Supported Authentication Methods[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/agent-manager#supported-authentication-methods "Supported Authentication Methods的链接")

1.  **Kilo Code Extension (Recommended)**
    
    *   Sign in through the extension settings
    *   Provides seamless authentication for the Agent Manager
    *   Enables session syncing and cloud features
2.  **CLI with Kilo Code Provider**
    
    *   Use the CLI configured with `kilocode` as the provider
    *   Run `kilocode config` to set up authentication
    *   See [CLI setup](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/cli)
         for details

### BYOK Limitations[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/agent-manager#byok-limitations "BYOK Limitations的链接")

**Important:** Bring Your Own Key (BYOK) is not yet supported with the Agent Manager.

If you're using BYOK with providers like Anthropic, OpenAI, or OpenRouter:

*   The Agent Manager will not have access to cloud-synced sessions
*   Session syncing features will be unavailable
*   You must use one of the supported authentication methods above for full functionality

To use the Agent Manager with all features enabled, switch to the Kilo Code provider or sign in through the extension.

Remote sessions (Cloud)[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/agent-manager#remote-sessions-cloud "Remote sessions (Cloud)的链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

When signed in (Kilo Cloud), the Agent Manager lists your recent cloud-synced sessions:

*   Up to 50 sessions are fetched
*   Sessions are filtered to the current repository via normalized Git remote URL
    *   If the current workspace has no remote, only sessions without a git\_url are shown
*   Selecting a remote session loads its message transcript
*   To continue the work locally, send a message — the Agent Manager will spawn a local process bound to that session

Message transcripts are fetched from a signed blob and exclude internal checkpoint "save" markers as chat rows (checkpoints still appear as dedicated entries in the UI).

Troubleshooting[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/agent-manager#troubleshooting "Troubleshooting的链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   CLI not found or outdated
    *   Install/update the CLI: [CLI setup](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/cli)
        
    *   If you see an "unknown option --json-io" error, update to the latest CLI
*   "Please open a folder…" error
    *   The Agent Manager requires a VS Code workspace folder
*   "Cannot use parallel mode from within a git worktree"
    *   Open the main repository (where .git is a directory), not a worktree checkout
*   Remote sessions not visible
    *   Ensure you're signed in and the repo's remote URL matches the sessions you expect to see
    *   If using BYOK, session syncing is not available — switch to Kilo Code provider or sign in through the extension
*   Authentication errors
    *   Verify you're logged in via extension settings or using CLI with kilocode provider
    *   BYOK configurations do not support Agent Manager authentication

Related features[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/agent-manager#related-features "Related features的链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   [Sessions](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/sessions)
    
*   [Auto-approving Actions](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/auto-approving-actions)
    
*   [CLI](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/cli)
    

*   [Prerequisites](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/agent-manager#prerequisites)
    
*   [Opening the Agent Manager](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/agent-manager#opening-the-agent-manager)
    
*   [Sending messages, approvals, and control](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/agent-manager#sending-messages-approvals-and-control)
    
*   [Resuming an existing session](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/agent-manager#resuming-an-existing-session)
    
*   [Parallel Mode](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/agent-manager#parallel-mode)
    *   [Worktree Location](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/agent-manager#worktree-location)
        
    *   [While Running](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/agent-manager#while-running)
        
    *   [After Completion](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/agent-manager#after-completion)
        
    *   [Resuming Sessions](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/agent-manager#resuming-sessions)
        
*   [Authentication Requirements](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/agent-manager#authentication-requirements)
    *   [Supported Authentication Methods](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/agent-manager#supported-authentication-methods)
        
    *   [BYOK Limitations](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/agent-manager#byok-limitations)
        
*   [Remote sessions (Cloud)](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/agent-manager#remote-sessions-cloud)
    
*   [Troubleshooting](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/agent-manager#troubleshooting)
    
*   [Related features](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/agent-manager#related-features)
    

* * *

Is this documentation incorrect or incomplete? [Report an issue on GitHub](https://github.com/Kilo-Org/kilocode/tree/main/apps/kilocode-docs/issues/new?title=Documentation%20Issue:%20%2Fdocs%2Fzh-CN%2Fadvanced-usage%2Fagent-manager)

# Auto Cleanup | Kilo Code Docs

[跳转到主要内容](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

目录

Auto Cleanup automatically manages your task history by removing old tasks to free up disk space and improve performance. Tasks are intelligently classified and retained based on their type and age, ensuring important work is preserved while temporary or experimental tasks are cleaned up.

Important

Task deletion is permanent and cannot be undone. Deleted tasks are completely removed from disk, including all conversation history, checkpoints, and associated files.

Overview[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#overview "Overview的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

As you work with Kilo Code, each task creates files containing conversation history, checkpoints, and other data. Over time, this accumulates and can consume significant disk space. Auto-Cleanup solves this by:

*   **Automatically removing old tasks** based on configurable retention periods
*   **Preserving important tasks** by classifying them into different types
*   **Protecting favorited tasks** from deletion
*   **Managing disk usage** without manual intervention

Key Benefits

*   **Free up disk space**: Automatically remove old task data
*   **Improve performance**: Reduce the size of task history
*   **Flexible control**: Configure different retention periods for different task types
*   **Safety first**: Favorited tasks can be protected from deletion
*   **Manual override**: Run cleanup manually whenever needed

How Auto-Cleanup Works[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#how-auto-cleanup-works "How Auto-Cleanup Works的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Auto-Cleanup uses an intelligent classification system to determine how long each task should be retained:

### Task Classification[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#task-classification "Task Classification的链接")

Every task is automatically classified into one of these categories:

| Task Type | Description | Default Retention |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Favorited** | Tasks you've marked as favorites | Never deleted (or 90 days if configured) |
| **Completed** | Tasks that successfully finished | 30 days |
| **Incomplete** | Tasks that were started but not completed | 7 days |
| **Regular** | Default classification for other tasks | 30 days |

#### Understanding Task Completion[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#understanding-task-completion "Understanding Task Completion的链接")

A task is considered "completed" when Kilo Code uses the [`attempt_completion`](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/attempt-completion)
 tool to formally mark it as finished. Tasks without this completion marker are classified as incomplete, even if you consider them done. This distinction helps clean up abandoned or experimental tasks more aggressively.

### Cleanup Process[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#cleanup-process "Cleanup Process的链接")

When Auto-Cleanup runs, it:

1.  **Scans all tasks** in your task history
2.  **Classifies each task** based on its properties and completion status
3.  **Checks retention periods** to determine eligibility for deletion
4.  **Protects active tasks** currently in use
5.  **Deletes eligible tasks** and their associated files
6.  **Reports results** including disk space freed

Configuration[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#configuration "Configuration的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Access Auto-Cleanup settings through the Kilo Code settings panel:

1.  Click the gear icon () in Kilo Code
2.  Navigate to the **Auto-Cleanup** section (under Checkpoints)

### Enable Auto-Cleanup[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#enable-auto-cleanup "Enable Auto-Cleanup的链接")

![Auto-Cleanup settings panel](https://kilo.ai/docs/img/auto-cleanup/settings.png)

Check the **"Enable automatic task cleanup"** option to activate the feature. When enabled, tasks will be automatically removed based on your retention settings.

### Retention Period Settings[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#retention-period-settings "Retention Period Settings的链接")

Configure how long different types of tasks are kept before cleanup:

#### Default Retention Period[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#default-retention-period "Default Retention Period的链接")

    Default: 30 daysMinimum: 1 day

Sets the base retention period for regular tasks that don't fall into other categories.

#### Favorited Tasks[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#favorited-tasks "Favorited Tasks的链接")

**Never delete favorited tasks** (recommended)

When enabled, favorited tasks are preserved indefinitely regardless of age. This is the safest option to prevent accidental deletion of important work.

If disabled, you can set a custom retention period:

    Default: 90 daysMinimum: 1 day

To favorite a task, use the star icon in the task history panel.

#### Completed Tasks[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#completed-tasks "Completed Tasks的链接")

    Default: 30 daysMinimum: 1 day

Tasks successfully completed via the [`attempt_completion`](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/attempt-completion)
 tool are retained for this period. These tasks typically represent finished work that may still be useful for reference.

#### Incomplete Tasks[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#incomplete-tasks "Incomplete Tasks的链接")

    Default: 7 daysMinimum: 1 day

Tasks without completion status are retained for a shorter period. This helps clean up experimental or abandoned tasks more quickly while still giving you time to review them.

### Last Cleanup Display[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#last-cleanup-display "Last Cleanup Display的链接")

The settings show when the last cleanup operation ran, helping you understand the cleanup schedule.

### Manual Cleanup[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#manual-cleanup "Manual Cleanup的链接")

Click the **"Run Cleanup Now"** button to immediately trigger a cleanup operation using your current settings. This is useful when:

*   You need to free up disk space urgently
*   You've changed retention settings and want them applied immediately
*   You want to preview what would be cleaned up (check the output)

Best Practices[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#best-practices "Best Practices的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Recommended Retention Periods[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#recommended-retention-periods "Recommended Retention Periods的链接")

**For Individual Developers:**

*   Default retention: 30 days
*   Completed tasks: 30 days
*   Incomplete tasks: 7 days
*   Favorited tasks: Never delete

**For Experimentation:**

*   Default retention: 14 days
*   Completed tasks: 14 days
*   Incomplete tasks: 3 days
*   Favorited tasks: Never delete

**For Limited Disk Space:**

*   Default retention: 14 days
*   Completed tasks: 14 days
*   Incomplete tasks: 3 days
*   Favorited tasks: 60 days

### Protecting Important Work[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#protecting-important-work "Protecting Important Work的链接")

To ensure important tasks are never deleted:

1.  **Mark tasks as favorites** using the star icon in task history
2.  **Enable "Never delete favorited tasks"** in settings
3.  **Review cleanup results** periodically to ensure retention periods are appropriate

### Balancing Disk Space and History[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#balancing-disk-space-and-history "Balancing Disk Space and History的链接")

Consider these factors when setting retention periods:

*   **Available disk space**: Shorter retention if space is limited
*   **Task frequency**: More tasks = shorter retention needed
*   **Reference needs**: Keep completed tasks longer if you often refer back
*   **Experimentation**: Shorter incomplete task retention for heavy experimentation

Troubleshooting[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#troubleshooting "Troubleshooting的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Tasks Not Being Cleaned Up[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#tasks-not-being-cleaned-up "Tasks Not Being Cleaned Up的链接")

**Issue**: Old tasks remain after cleanup runs

**Solutions**:

1.  Verify Auto-Cleanup is enabled in settings
2.  Check retention periods - they may be too long
3.  Verify tasks are older than the retention period
4.  Check if tasks are favorited (they won't be deleted if "Never delete" is enabled)

### Important Task Was Deleted[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#important-task-was-deleted "Important Task Was Deleted的链接")

**Issue**: A task you needed was removed

**Prevention**:

1.  Always favorite important tasks before they age out
2.  Set longer retention periods for task types you reference frequently
3.  Consider enabling "Never delete favorited tasks"
4.  Export or backup critical task data before it ages out

注意

Deleted tasks cannot be recovered. Always favorite important tasks or adjust retention periods to prevent accidental deletion.

### Cleanup Using Too Much Disk I/O[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#cleanup-using-too-much-disk-io "Cleanup Using Too Much Disk I/O的链接")

**Issue**: Cleanup operation impacts system performance

**Solutions**:

1.  Check the "Operation duration" in cleanup results
2.  If slow, consider reducing retention periods to clean fewer tasks at once
3.  Run manual cleanup during non-working hours
4.  Ensure adequate system resources during cleanup

### Active Task Protection[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#active-task-protection "Active Task Protection的链接")

Auto-Cleanup automatically protects your currently active task from deletion, even if it meets the age criteria. This ensures you never lose work in progress during a cleanup operation.

Technical Details[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#technical-details "Technical Details的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### What Gets Deleted[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#what-gets-deleted "What Gets Deleted的链接")

When a task is deleted, the following are permanently removed:

*   Task directory and all contents
*   Conversation history and messages
*   Checkpoints (if enabled)
*   API request logs
*   Task metadata
*   Associated temporary files

### Storage Location[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#storage-location "Storage Location的链接")

Task data is stored in your VS Code global storage location:

*   **macOS**: `~/Library/Application Support/Code/User/globalStorage/kilocode.kilo-code/`
*   **Windows**: `%APPDATA%\Code\User\globalStorage\kilocode.kilo-code\`
*   **Linux**: `~/.config/Code/User/globalStorage/kilocode.kilo-code/`

Privacy & Data Handling[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#privacy--data-handling "Privacy & Data Handling的链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Local Operation**: All cleanup happens locally on your machine
*   **No Cloud Backup**: Deleted tasks are not backed up automatically
*   **Telemetry**: Anonymous usage statistics (tasks cleaned, disk space freed) are collected if telemetry is enabled
*   **No Content Sharing**: Task content, code, or personal information is never transmitted

Related Features[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#related-features "Related Features的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   [**Checkpoints**](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/checkpoints)
    : Version control for tasks that can be restored
*   [**Settings Management**](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/settings-management)
    : Export/import settings including cleanup configuration
*   [**Task History**](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/the-chat-interface)
    : Managing and organizing your task history

Frequently Asked Questions[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#frequently-asked-questions "Frequently Asked Questions的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Does Auto-Cleanup run automatically?[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#does-auto-cleanup-run-automatically "Does Auto-Cleanup run automatically?的链接")

Yes, when enabled, Auto-Cleanup runs automatically based on the configured schedule. You can also trigger it manually using the "Run Cleanup Now" button.

### Can I recover deleted tasks?[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#can-i-recover-deleted-tasks "Can I recover deleted tasks?的链接")

No, task deletion is permanent. Always favorite important tasks or adjust retention periods to prevent accidental deletion.

### Does cleanup affect my current task?[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#does-cleanup-affect-my-current-task "Does cleanup affect my current task?的链接")

No, the active task you're currently working on is automatically protected from deletion.

### What happens to checkpoints when a task is deleted?[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#what-happens-to-checkpoints-when-a-task-is-deleted "What happens to checkpoints when a task is deleted?的链接")

All checkpoints associated with a deleted task are permanently removed along with the task data.

### Can I temporarily disable cleanup?[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#can-i-temporarily-disable-cleanup "Can I temporarily disable cleanup?的链接")

Yes, simply uncheck the "Enable automatic task cleanup" option in settings. Your configuration is preserved for when you enable it again.

### Why are some old tasks not being deleted?[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/auto-cleanup#why-are-some-old-tasks-not-being-deleted "Why are some old tasks not being deleted?的链接")

Check if they are:

1.  Favorited with "Never delete favorited tasks" enabled
2.  Recently modified (even viewing a task may update its timestamp)
3.  Protected by a longer retention period based on their type

# Cloud Agents | Kilo Code Docs

[跳转到主要内容](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/cloud-agent#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

目录

Cloud Agents let you run Kilo Code in the cloud from any device, without relying on your local machine. They provide a remote development environment that can read and modify your GitHub repositories, run commands, and auto-commit changes as work progresses.

* * *

What Cloud Agents Enable[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/cloud-agent#what-cloud-agents-enable "What Cloud Agents Enable的链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   Run Kilo Code remotely from a browser
*   Auto-create branches and push work continuously
*   Use env vars + startup commands to shape the workspace
*   Work from anywhere while keeping your repo in sync

* * *

Prerequisites[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/cloud-agent#prerequisites "Prerequisites的链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Before using Cloud Agents:

*   **GitHub Integration must be configured**  
    Connect your account via the [Integrations tab](https://app.kilo.ai/integrations)
     so that Cloud Agents can access your repositories.

* * *

Cost[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/cloud-agent#cost "Cost的链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Compute is free during limited beta**
    *   Please provide any feedback in our Cloud Agents beta Discord channel:
        *   [Kilo Discord](https://kilo.ai/discord)
            
*   **Kilo Code credits are still used** when the agent performs work (model usage, operations, etc.).

* * *

How to Use[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/cloud-agent#how-to-use "How to Use的链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1.  **Connect your GitHub account** in the [Integrations](https://app.kilo.ai/integrations)
     tab of your personal or organization dashboard.
2.  **Select a repository** to use as your workspace.
3.  **Add environment variables** (secrets supported) and set optional startup commands.
4.  **Start chatting with Kilo Code.**

Your work is always pushed to GitHub, ensuring nothing is lost.

* * *

How Cloud Agents Work[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/cloud-agent#how-cloud-agents-work "How Cloud Agents Work的链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   Each user receives an **isolated Linux container** with common dev tools preinstalled (Node.js, git, gh CLI, etc.).
    
*   All Cloud Agent chats share a **single container instance**, while each session gets its own workspace directory.
    
*   When a session begins:
    
    1.  Your repo is cloned
    2.  A unique branch is created
    3.  Your startup commands run
    4.  Env vars are injected
*   After every message, the agent:
    
    *   Looks for file changes
    *   Commits them
    *   Pushes to the session’s branch
*   Containers are **ephemeral**:
    
    *   Spindown occurs after inactivity
    *   Expect slightly longer setup after idle periods
    *   Inactive cloud agent sessions are deleted after **7 days** during the beta, expired sessions are still accessible via the CLI

* * *

Environment Variables & Startup Commands[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/cloud-agent#environment-variables--startup-commands "Environment Variables & Startup Commands的链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

You can customize each Cloud Agent session by defining:

### Environment Variables[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/cloud-agent#environment-variables "Environment Variables的链接")

*   Add key/value pairs or secrets
*   Injected into the container before the session starts
*   Useful for API keys or config flags

### Startup Commands[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/cloud-agent#startup-commands "Startup Commands的链接")

*   Commands run immediately after cloning the repo and checking out the session branch
*   Great for:
    *   Installing dependencies
    *   Bootstrapping tooling
    *   Running setup scripts

* * *

Skills[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/cloud-agent#skills "Skills的链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Cloud Agents support project-level [skills](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/cli#skills)
 stored in your repository. When your repo is cloned, any skills in `.kilocode/skills/` are automatically available.

备注

Global skills (`~/.kilocode/skills/`) are not available in Cloud Agents since there is no persistent user home directory.

* * *

Perfect For[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/cloud-agent#perfect-for "Perfect For的链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Cloud Agents are great for:

*   **Remote debugging** using Kilo Code debug mode
*   **Exploration of unfamiliar codebases** without touching your local machine
*   **Architect-mode brainstorming** while on the go
*   **Automated refactors or tech debt cleanup** driven by Kilo Code
*   **Offloading CI-like tasks**, experiments, or batch updates

* * *

Limitations and Guidance[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/cloud-agent#limitations-and-guidance "Limitations and Guidance的链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   Each message can run for **up to 15 minutes**. Break large tasks into smaller steps; use a `plan.md` or `todo.md` file to keep scope clear.
*   **Context is persistent across messages.** Kilo Code remembers previous turns within the same session.
*   **Auto/YOLO mode is always on.** The agent will modify code without prompting for confirmation.
*   **Sessions are restorable locally** and local sessions can be resumed in Cloud Agent.
*   **Sessions prior to December 9th 2025** may not be accessible in the web UI.
*   **MCP support is coming**, but **Docker-based MCP servers will _not_ be supported**.

*   [What Cloud Agents Enable](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/cloud-agent#what-cloud-agents-enable)
    
*   [Prerequisites](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/cloud-agent#prerequisites)
    
*   [Cost](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/cloud-agent#cost)
    
*   [How to Use](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/cloud-agent#how-to-use)
    
*   [How Cloud Agents Work](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/cloud-agent#how-cloud-agents-work)
    
*   [Environment Variables & Startup Commands](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/cloud-agent#environment-variables--startup-commands)
    *   [Environment Variables](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/cloud-agent#environment-variables)
        
    *   [Startup Commands](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/cloud-agent#startup-commands)
        
*   [Skills](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/cloud-agent#skills)
    
*   [Perfect For](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/cloud-agent#perfect-for)
    
*   [Limitations and Guidance](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/cloud-agent#limitations-and-guidance)
    

* * *

Is this documentation incorrect or incomplete? [Report an issue on GitHub](https://github.com/Kilo-Org/kilocode/tree/main/apps/kilocode-docs/issues/new?title=Documentation%20Issue:%20%2Fdocs%2Fzh-CN%2Fadvanced-usage%2Fcloud-agent)

# codebase_search | Kilo Code Docs

[跳转到主要内容](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/available-tools/codebase-search#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

目录

实验性功能

`codebase_search` 工具需要额外的设置，包括嵌入提供程序和向量数据库。

`codebase_search` 工具使用 AI 嵌入在整个代码库中执行语义搜索。与传统的基于文本的搜索不同，它能理解查询的含义，即使没有完全匹配的关键字，也能找到相关的代码。

参数[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/available-tools/codebase-search#%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "参数的链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

该工具接受以下参数：

*   `query`（必填）：自然语言搜索查询，描述你要查找的内容
*   `path`（可选）：目录路径，用于将搜索范围限制在代码库的特定部分

功能[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/available-tools/codebase-search#%E5%8A%9F%E8%83%BD "功能的链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

该工具通过语义相似性而非精确文本匹配来搜索你的索引代码库。它能找到与你的查询在概念上相关的代码块，即使它们不包含你搜索的确切单词。结果包括相关代码片段、文件路径、行号和相似度分数。

使用场景[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/available-tools/codebase-search#%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E5%9C%BA%E6%99%AF "使用场景的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   当 Kilo Code 需要在项目中查找与特定功能相关的代码时
*   当查找实现模式或相似代码结构时
*   当搜索错误处理、身份验证或其他概念性代码模式时
*   当探索不熟悉的代码库以了解功能实现时
*   当查找可能受更改或重构影响的代码时

主要特性[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/available-tools/codebase-search#%E4%B8%BB%E8%A6%81%E7%89%B9%E6%80%A7 "主要特性的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **语义理解**：通过含义而非精确关键字匹配查找代码
*   **跨项目搜索**：搜索整个索引代码库，而不仅仅是打开的文件
*   **上下文结果**：返回包含文件路径和行号的代码片段，便于导航
*   **相似度评分**：结果按相关性排序，带有相似度分数（0-1 范围）
*   **范围过滤**：可选路径参数，用于将搜索限制在特定目录
*   **智能排序**：结果按与查询的语义相关性排序
*   **UI 集成**：结果显示语法高亮和导航链接
*   **性能优化**：快速向量搜索，具有可配置的结果限制

要求[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/available-tools/codebase-search#%E8%A6%81%E6%B1%82 "要求的链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

该工具仅在实验性代码库索引功能正确配置时可用：

*   **功能启用**：必须在实验设置中启用代码库索引
*   **嵌入提供程序**：需要 OpenAI API 密钥或 Ollama 配置
*   **向量数据库**：需要运行并访问 Qdrant 实例
*   **索引状态**：代码库必须已索引（状态："已索引" 或 "正在索引"）

限制[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/available-tools/codebase-search#%E9%99%90%E5%88%B6 "限制的链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **实验性功能**：属于实验性代码库索引系统的一部分
*   **需要配置**：依赖外部服务（嵌入提供程序 + Qdrant）
*   **索引依赖**：仅搜索已索引的代码块
*   **结果限制**：每次搜索最多返回 50 个结果以保持性能
*   **相似度阈值**：仅返回相似度分数高于 0.4 的结果
*   **文件大小限制**：仅限于成功索引的小于 1MB 的文件
*   **语言支持**：效果取决于 Tree-sitter 语言支持

工作原理[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/available-tools/codebase-search#%E5%B7%A5%E4%BD%9C%E5%8E%9F%E7%90%86 "工作原理的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

当调用 `codebase_search` 工具时，它会遵循以下过程：

1.  **可用性验证**：
    
    *   验证 CodeIndexManager 是否可用并已初始化
    *   确认设置中已启用代码库索引
    *   检查索引是否正确配置（API 密钥、Qdrant URL）
    *   验证当前索引状态是否允许搜索
2.  **查询处理**：
    
    *   获取你的自然语言查询并生成嵌入向量
    *   使用为索引配置的相同嵌入提供程序（OpenAI 或 Ollama）
    *   将查询的语义转换为数学表示
3.  **向量搜索执行**：
    
    *   在 Qdrant 向量数据库中搜索相似的代码嵌入
    *   使用余弦相似度查找最相关的代码块
    *   应用最小相似度阈值（0.4）以过滤结果
    *   将结果限制为 50 个匹配项以优化性能
4.  **路径过滤**（如果指定）：
    
    *   过滤结果，仅包括指定目录路径中的文件
    *   使用标准化路径比较以进行准确过滤
    *   在过滤范围内保持相关性排序
5.  **结果处理和格式化**：
    
    *   将绝对文件路径转换为工作区相对路径
    *   使用文件路径、行范围、相似度分数和代码内容构建结果
    *   格式化为 AI 使用和 UI 显示，并带有语法高亮
6.  **双重输出格式**：
    
    *   **AI 输出**：结构化文本格式，包含查询、文件路径、分数和代码块
    *   **UI 输出**：JSON 格式，带有语法高亮和导航功能

搜索查询最佳实践[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/available-tools/codebase-search#%E6%90%9C%E7%B4%A2%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%9C%80%E4%BD%B3%E5%AE%9E%E8%B7%B5 "搜索查询最佳实践的链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 有效查询模式[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/available-tools/codebase-search#%E6%9C%89%E6%95%88%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%A8%A1%E5%BC%8F "有效查询模式的链接")

**良好：概念性和具体性**

    <codebase_search><query>用户身份验证和密码验证</query></codebase_search>

**良好：功能导向**

    <codebase_search><query>数据库连接池设置</query></codebase_search>

**良好：问题导向**

    <codebase_search><query>API 请求的错误处理</query></codebase_search>

**效果较差：过于通用**

    <codebase_search><query>函数</query></codebase_search>

### 适用查询类型[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/available-tools/codebase-search#%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B "适用查询类型的链接")

*   **功能描述**："文件上传处理"，"电子邮件验证逻辑"
*   **技术模式**："单例模式实现"，"工厂方法使用"
*   **领域概念**："用户档案管理"，"支付处理流程"
*   **架构组件**："中间件配置"，"数据库迁移脚本"

目录范围限定[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/available-tools/codebase-search#%E7%9B%AE%E5%BD%95%E8%8C%83%E5%9B%B4%E9%99%90%E5%AE%9A "目录范围限定的链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

使用可选的 `path` 参数将搜索范围限定在代码库的特定部分：

**在 API 模块中搜索：**

    <codebase_search><query>端点验证中间件</query><path>src/api</path></codebase_search>

**在测试文件中搜索：**

    <codebase_search><query>模拟数据设置模式</query><path>tests</path></codebase_search>

**在特定功能目录中搜索：**

    <codebase_search><query>组件状态管理</query><path>src/components/auth</path></codebase_search>

结果解释[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/available-tools/codebase-search#%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E8%A7%A3%E9%87%8A "结果解释的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 相似度分数[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/available-tools/codebase-search#%E7%9B%B8%E4%BC%BC%E5%BA%A6%E5%88%86%E6%95%B0 "相似度分数的链接")

*   **0.8-1.0**：高度相关匹配，很可能是你要找的内容
*   **0.6-0.8**：良好匹配，具有强概念相似性
*   **0.4-0.6**：可能相关，但可能需要审查
*   **低于 0.4**：作为太不相关而被过滤掉

### 结果结构[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/available-tools/codebase-search#%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%84 "结果结构的链接")

每个搜索结果包括：

*   **文件路径**：包含匹配项的文件的工作区相对路径
*   **分数**：表示相关性的相似度分数（0.4-1.0）
*   **行范围**：代码块的起始和结束行号
*   **代码块**：与查询匹配的实际代码内容

使用示例[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/available-tools/codebase-search#%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "使用示例的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   当 Kilo Code 实现新功能时，搜索 "身份验证中间件" 以在编写新代码之前了解现有模式。
*   当调试问题时，Kilo Code 搜索 "API 调用中的错误处理" 以查找代码库中相关的错误模式。
*   当重构代码时，Kilo Code 搜索 "数据库事务模式" 以确保所有数据库操作的一致性。
*   当加入新代码库时，Kilo Code 搜索 "配置加载" 以了解应用程序如何引导。

使用示例[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/available-tools/codebase-search#%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B-1 "使用示例的链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

在整个项目中搜索与身份验证相关的代码：

    <codebase_search><query>用户登录和身份验证逻辑</query></codebase_search>

在特定目录中查找与数据库相关的代码：

    <codebase_search><query>数据库连接和查询执行</query><path>src/data</path></codebase_search>

在 API 代码中查找错误处理模式：

    <codebase_search><query>HTTP 错误响应和异常处理</query><path>src/api</path></codebase_search>

搜索测试工具和模拟设置：

    <codebase_search><query>测试设置和模拟数据创建</query><path>tests</path></codebase_search>

查找配置和环境设置代码：

    <codebase_search><query>环境变量和应用程序配置</query></codebase_search>

*   [参数](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/available-tools/codebase-search#%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0)

    *   [有效查询模式](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/available-tools/codebase-search#%E6%9C%89%E6%95%88%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%A8%A1%E5%BC%8F)
        
    *   [适用查询类型](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/available-tools/codebase-search#%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B)

*   [结果解释](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/available-tools/codebase-search#%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E8%A7%A3%E9%87%8A)

# Deploy | Kilo Code Docs

[跳转到主要内容](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/deploy#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

目录

Kilo Deploy lets you ship **Next.js** applications directly from Kilo Code, with:

*   **One-click deployment** from the Kilo Code dashboard
*   **No manual configuration** — deployment settings are generated for you
*   **Deployment history** with logs and build details
*   **Automatic rebuilds** on every GitHub push

* * *

Prerequisites[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/deploy#prerequisites "Prerequisites的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   Your project must use **Next.js 15** (all minor/patch versions) or the **latest minor of Next.js 14**
*   You must enable the **GitHub Integration**
    *   Go to **Integrations → GitHub**
    *   Click **Configure** and follow the prompts to connect GitHub to Kilo Code

Deploy supports all major package managers: **npm, pnpm, yarn, bun**. Kilo Code automatically detects which one your project uses and runs the correct build command.

* * *

Deploying Your App[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/deploy#deploying-your-app "Deploying Your App的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 1\. Open the Deploy Tab[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/deploy#1-open-the-deploy-tab "1. Open the Deploy Tab的链接")

*   Navigate to your [Organization dashboard](https://app.kilo.ai/organizations)
     or [Profile](https://app.kilo.ai/profile)
    
*   Select the **Deploy** tab

### 2\. Select Your Project[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/deploy#2-select-your-project "2. Select Your Project的链接")

*   Click **New Deployment**
*   Choose **GitHub** in the Integration dropdown
*   Select your repository and branch

![DeploySelection](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/e592a7c1-a2dd-42e3-ba5d-d86d9b61001f)

### 3\. Click **Deploy**[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/deploy#3-click-deploy "3-click-deploy的链接")

Kilo Code will:

*   Build your project
*   Upload artifacts
*   Provision your deployment
*   Stream logs in real time

Once complete, you’ll receive a **deployment URL** you can open or share.

![DeploySuccess](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/4a01ad52-1783-443f-9f9e-bfc2d4b77b43)

* * *

Deployment History & Rollbacks[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/deploy#deployment-history--rollbacks "Deployment History & Rollbacks的链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Each deployment is saved automatically with:

*   Timestamp
*   Build logs
*   Deployment URL (Preview/Production)

From the deployment details, you can:

*   Inspect previous builds
*   Redeploy
*   Delete deployments

* * *

Database Support[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/deploy#database-support "Database Support的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Kilo Deploy does **not** include built-in database hosting, but you can connect to any external database service.

* * *

Environment Variables[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/deploy#environment-variables "Environment Variables的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Kilo Deploy supports Environment Variables and Secrets. Add the variable **key** and **value** during the **Create New Deployment** step, and toggle to mark as secrets.

Common Use Cases[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/deploy#common-use-cases "Common Use Cases的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Deploy is ideal for:

1.  **Quick prototypes** — instantly push an idea live
2.  **Staging environments** — share a preview environment
3.  **Rapid iteration** — push commits and get automatic rebuilds

*   [Prerequisites](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/deploy#prerequisites)
    
*   [Deploying Your App](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/deploy#deploying-your-app)
    *   [1\. Open the Deploy Tab](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/deploy#1-open-the-deploy-tab)
        
    *   [2\. Select Your Project](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/deploy#2-select-your-project)
        
    *   [3\. Click **Deploy**](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/deploy#3-click-deploy)
        
*   [Deployment History & Rollbacks](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/deploy#deployment-history--rollbacks)
    
*   [Database Support](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/deploy#database-support)
    
*   [Environment Variables](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/deploy#environment-variables)
    
*   [Common Use Cases](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/deploy#common-use-cases)
    

* * *

Is this documentation incorrect or incomplete? [Report an issue on GitHub](https://github.com/Kilo-Org/kilocode/tree/main/apps/kilocode-docs/issues/new?title=Documentation%20Issue:%20%2Fdocs%2Fzh-CN%2Fadvanced-usage%2Fdeploy)

# Code Reviews | Kilo Code Docs

[跳转到主要内容](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/code-reviews#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

目录

Kilo's **Code Reviews** feature automatically analyzes your pull requests using an AI model of your choice. It can review code the moment a PR is opened or updated, surface issues, and provide structured feedback across performance, security, style, and test coverage.

* * *

What Code Reviews Enable[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/code-reviews#what-code-reviews-enable "What Code Reviews Enable的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   Automated AI review on every pull request
*   Consistent feedback based on your team’s standards
*   Automatic detection of bugs, security risks, and anti-patterns
*   Deep reasoning over changed files, diffs, and repo context
*   Customizable review strictness and focus areas

* * *

Prerequisites[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/code-reviews#prerequisites "Prerequisites的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Before enabling Code Reviews:

*   **GitHub Integration must be configured**  
    Connect your account via the [Integrations tab](https://app.kilo.ai/integrations)
     so that the Review Agent can access your repositories.

* * *

Cost[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/code-reviews#cost "Cost的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Compute and review time are free during limited beta**
    *   Feedback is welcome in the Code Reviews beta Discord channel:
        *   [Kilo Discord](https://discord.gg/hZnd57qN)
            
*   **Kilo Code credits are still used** when the agent performs model reasoning during a review.

* * *

How to Use[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/code-reviews#how-to-use "How to Use的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1.  Go to the **Review Agent** section in your Kilo Code [personal](https://app.kilo.ai/profile)
     or [Organization](https://app.kilo.ai/organizations)
     dashboard.
2.  Toggle **Enable AI Code Review** to automatically review PRs on open/update.
3.  Choose an **AI Model** (e.g., Grok Code Fast 1).
4.  Select a **Review Style**:
    *   Strict
    *   Balanced
    *   Lenient
5.  Choose which **repositories** should receive automatic reviews.
6.  Optionally select **Focus Areas** such as:
    *   Security vulnerabilities
    *   Performance issues
    *   Bug detection
    *   Code style
    *   Test coverage
    *   Documentation gaps
7.  Set a **maximum review time** (5–30 minutes).
8.  Add **custom instructions** to shape how the agent reviews your code.

Once configured, the Review Agent will run automatically on PR events.

* * *

How Code Reviews Work[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/code-reviews#how-code-reviews-work "How Code Reviews Work的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   When a pull request is opened or updated:
    1.  The Review Agent receives the PR metadata, diff, and file context.
    2.  The selected model analyzes all changes.
    3.  The agent applies your chosen review style and focus areas.
    4.  It generates a structured review with:
        *   Inline comments
        *   Summary findings
        *   Suggested fixes
        *   Risk and severity tagging
*   Reviews respect the **maximum time limit** you set.
*   Only repositories you’ve selected will trigger automatic analysis.

Reviews are posted directly in GitHub as if coming from a team reviewer.

* * *

Review Styles[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/code-reviews#review-styles "Review Styles的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Strict[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/code-reviews#strict "Strict的链接")

*   Flags all potential issues
*   Emphasizes correctness, quality, and security
*   Useful for mission-critical code paths or production services

### Balanced[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/code-reviews#balanced "Balanced的链接")

*   Most popular option
*   Prioritizes clarity and practicality
*   Surfaces important issues without overwhelming noise

### Lenient[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/code-reviews#lenient "Lenient的链接")

*   Flags only critical issues
*   Encouraging and lightweight
*   Ideal for exploratory PRs, prototypes, or early WIP reviews

* * *

Focus Areas[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/code-reviews#focus-areas "Focus Areas的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

You can tailor what the Review Agent pays attention to:

### Security Vulnerabilities[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/code-reviews#security-vulnerabilities "Security Vulnerabilities的链接")

*   SQL injection
*   XSS
*   Unsafe APIs
*   Secrets and credential exposure

### Performance Issues[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/code-reviews#performance-issues "Performance Issues的链接")

*   N+1 queries
*   Inefficient loops
*   High-complexity functions

### Bug Detection[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/code-reviews#bug-detection "Bug Detection的链接")

*   Logic errors
*   Edge-case failures
*   Incorrect assumptions

### Code Style[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/code-reviews#code-style "Code Style的链接")

*   Formatting
*   Naming conventions
*   Readability improvements

### Test Coverage[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/code-reviews#test-coverage "Test Coverage的链接")

*   Missing or inadequate tests
*   Uncovered logic paths

### Documentation[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/code-reviews#documentation "Documentation的链接")

*   Missing comments
*   Unclear APIs

* * *

Perfect For[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/code-reviews#perfect-for "Perfect For的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The Review Agent is ideal for:

*   **Teams wanting consistent, real-time PR reviews**
*   **Small teams without dedicated reviewers**
*   **Large repos where issues are easy to miss**
*   **High-velocity engineering orgs shipping many daily PRs**
*   **Security-focused environments requiring strict gates**
*   **Educating junior developers with rich explanations**

* * *

Limitations and Guidance[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/code-reviews#limitations-and-guidance "Limitations and Guidance的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   Reviews can run for **up to 30 minutes** depending on your setting.
*   The agent reviews **only the changed files**, not the entire repository.
*   Some highly dynamic or domain-specific code may require additional context in custom instructions.
*   The agent will only run on **selected repositories**.
*   During beta, review capacity may be throttled for extremely large PRs.

*   [What Code Reviews Enable](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/code-reviews#what-code-reviews-enable)
    
*   [Prerequisites](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/code-reviews#prerequisites)
    
*   [Cost](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/code-reviews#cost)
    
*   [How to Use](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/code-reviews#how-to-use)
    
*   [How Code Reviews Work](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/code-reviews#how-code-reviews-work)
    
*   [Review Styles](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/code-reviews#review-styles)
    *   [Strict](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/code-reviews#strict)

    *   [Security Vulnerabilities](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/code-reviews#security-vulnerabilities)

    *   [Bug Detection](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/code-reviews#bug-detection)
        
    *   [Code Style](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/code-reviews#code-style)
        
    *   [Test Coverage](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/code-reviews#test-coverage)
        
    *   [Documentation](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/code-reviews#documentation)
        
*   [Perfect For](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/code-reviews#perfect-for)

* * *

Is this documentation incorrect or incomplete? [Report an issue on GitHub](https://github.com/Kilo-Org/kilocode/tree/main/apps/kilocode-docs/issues/new?title=Documentation%20Issue:%20%2Fdocs%2Fzh-CN%2Fadvanced-usage%2Fcode-reviews)

# 处理大型项目 | Kilo Code Docs

[跳转到主要内容](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/large-projects#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

目录

Kilo Code 可以用于任何规模的项目，但处理大型项目时需要特别注意上下文管理。以下是一些处理大型代码库的技巧：

理解上下文限制[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/large-projects#%E7%90%86%E8%A7%A3%E4%B8%8A%E4%B8%8B%E6%96%87%E9%99%90%E5%88%B6 "理解上下文限制的链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Kilo Code 使用的大语言模型 (LLMs) 有一个有限的 "上下文窗口"。这是模型一次可以处理的文本的最大量（以 token 为单位）。如果上下文过大，模型可能无法理解你的请求或生成准确的响应。

上下文窗口包括：

*   系统提示（Kilo Code 的指令）。
*   对话历史记录。
*   你使用 `@` 提到的任何文件内容。
*   Kilo Code 使用的任何命令或工具的输出。

管理上下文的策略[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/large-projects#%E7%AE%A1%E7%90%86%E4%B8%8A%E4%B8%8B%E6%96%87%E7%9A%84%E7%AD%96%E7%95%A5 "管理上下文的策略的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1.  **具体化：** 当引用文件或代码时，使用具体的文件路径和函数名称。避免使用模糊的引用，如 "主文件"。
    
2.  **有效使用上下文提及：** 使用 `@/path/to/file.ts` 来包含特定文件。使用 `@problems` 来包含当前错误和警告。使用 `@` 后跟提交哈希来引用特定的 Git 提交。
    
3.  **分解任务：** 将大型任务分解为更小、更易管理的子任务。这有助于保持上下文的聚焦。
    
4.  **总结：** 如果需要引用大量代码，考虑在提示中总结相关部分，而不是包含整个代码。
    
5.  **优先处理最近的历史记录：** Kilo Code 会自动截断对话历史记录中的旧消息，以保持在上下文窗口内。请注意这一点，并在需要时重新包含重要上下文。
    
6.  **使用提示缓存（如果可用）：** 一些 API 提供商如 Anthropic、OpenAI、OpenRouter 和 Requesty 支持 "提示缓存"。这将缓存你的提示以供未来任务使用，有助于降低请求的成本和延迟。
    

示例：重构大型文件[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/large-projects#%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B%E9%87%8D%E6%9E%84%E5%A4%A7%E5%9E%8B%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6 "示例：重构大型文件的链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

假设你需要重构一个大型 TypeScript 文件 (`src/components/MyComponent.tsx`)。以下是一个可能的方法：

1.  **初始概览：**
    
        @/src/components/MyComponent.tsx 列出此文件中的函数和类。
    
2.  **定位特定函数：**
    
        @/src/components/MyComponent.tsx 将 `processData` 函数重构为使用 `async/await` 而不是 Promises。
    
3.  **迭代更改：** 进行小的、增量的更改，审查并批准每一步。
    

通过分解任务并提供具体的上下文，即使在上下文窗口有限的情况下，你也可以有效地处理大型文件。

*   [理解上下文限制](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/large-projects#%E7%90%86%E8%A7%A3%E4%B8%8A%E4%B8%8B%E6%96%87%E9%99%90%E5%88%B6)
    
*   [管理上下文的策略](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/large-projects#%E7%AE%A1%E7%90%86%E4%B8%8A%E4%B8%8B%E6%96%87%E7%9A%84%E7%AD%96%E7%95%A5)
    
*   [示例：重构大型文件](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/large-projects#%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B%E9%87%8D%E6%9E%84%E5%A4%A7%E5%9E%8B%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6)
    

* * *

Is this documentation incorrect or incomplete? [Report an issue on GitHub](https://github.com/Kilo-Org/kilocode/tree/main/apps/kilocode-docs/issues/new?title=Documentation%20Issue:%20%2Fdocs%2Fzh-CN%2Fadvanced-usage%2Flarge-projects)

# Kilo Integrations | Kilo Code Docs

[跳转到主要内容](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/integrations#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

目录

Kilo Integrations lets you connect your GitHub account (and soon, GitLab and Bitbucket) to enable advanced features inside Kilo Code. Once connected, Kilo can access your repositories securely through the **KiloConnect** GitHub App, enabling features like **Cloud Agents** and **Kilo Deploy**.

* * *

What You Can Do With Integrations[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/integrations#what-you-can-do-with-integrations "What You Can Do With Integrations的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Connect GitHub to Kilo Code** in a few clicks
*   **Authorize the KiloConnect App** for repo access
*   **Enable advanced features** like Cloud Agents and Kilo Deploy

* * *

Prerequisites[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/integrations#prerequisites "Prerequisites的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Before connecting:

*   You must have a **GitHub account**.
*   You need permission to install GitHub Apps for the repositories you want Kilo to access.
*   (Optional) If you're connecting an organization, you must be an **org admin** or have app installation permissions.

* * *

Connecting GitHub to Kilo[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/integrations#connecting-github-to-kilo "Connecting GitHub to Kilo的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 1\. Open the Integrations Page[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/integrations#1-open-the-integrations-page "1. Open the Integrations Page的链接")

Go to your **Personal** or **Organization Dashboard**, and navigate to the [Integrations](https://app.kilo.ai/integrations)
 tab

### 2\. Start the Connection Flow[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/integrations#2-start-the-connection-flow "2. Start the Connection Flow的链接")

1.  Click **Configure** on the GitHub panel.
2.  You’ll be redirected to GitHub to authorize the **KiloConnect** App.
3.  Select the GitHub account or organization you want to connect.

### 3\. Choose Repository Access[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/integrations#3-choose-repository-access "3. Choose Repository Access的链接")

GitHub will ask which repositories you want Kilo to access:

*   **All repositories** (recommended if you plan to use Cloud Agents or Deploy across multiple projects)
*   **Only selected repositories** (choose specific repos)

Click **Install & Authorize** to continue.

### 4\. Complete Authorization[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/integrations#4-complete-authorization "4. Complete Authorization的链接")

Once approved:

*   You’ll return to the Kilo Integrations page.
*   Github will show a **Connected** status.
*   Your Kilo workspace can now access GitHub repositories securely.

* * *

What Happens After Connecting[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/integrations#what-happens-after-connecting "What Happens After Connecting的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Once GitHub is connected, the following features will be enabled in Kilo:

### Cloud Agents[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/integrations#cloud-agents "Cloud Agents的链接")

*   Run Kilo Code in the cloud from any device
*   Auto-create branches and push work continuously
*   Work from anywhere while keeping your repo in sync

### Kilo Deploy[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/integrations#kilo-deploy "Kilo Deploy的链接")

*   Deploy Next.js 14 & 15 apps directly from Kilo
*   Trigger rebuilds automatically on push
*   Manage deployment logs and history

### Upcoming:[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/integrations#upcoming "Upcoming:的链接")

*   **GitLab Integration**
*   **Bitbucket Integration**

* * *

Managing or Removing the Integration[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/integrations#managing-or-removing-the-integration "Managing or Removing the Integration的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

From the same **Integrations** page, you can click "Manage on Github" to:

*   View the GitHub account you connected
*   Update which repositories Kilo has access to
*   Disconnect GitHub entirely
*   Reauthorize the app if permissions change

* * *

Troubleshooting[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/integrations#troubleshooting "Troubleshooting的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**“I don’t see my repositories.”**  
Ensure the KiloConnect App is installed for the correct GitHub org and that repo access includes the repositories you need.

**“My organization blocks third-party apps.”**  
You may need an admin to approve installing GitHub Apps.

**“Cloud Agents or Deploy can’t access my repo.”**  
Revisit the GitHub app settings and confirm the app has the correct repo scope.

*   [What You Can Do With Integrations](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/integrations#what-you-can-do-with-integrations)
    
*   [Prerequisites](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/integrations#prerequisites)
    
*   [Connecting GitHub to Kilo](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/integrations#connecting-github-to-kilo)
    *   [1\. Open the Integrations Page](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/integrations#1-open-the-integrations-page)

    *   [4\. Complete Authorization](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/integrations#4-complete-authorization)
        
*   [What Happens After Connecting](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/integrations#what-happens-after-connecting)
    *   [Cloud Agents](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/integrations#cloud-agents)
        
    *   [Kilo Deploy](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/integrations#kilo-deploy)
        
    *   [Upcoming:](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/integrations#upcoming)
        
*   [Managing or Removing the Integration](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/integrations#managing-or-removing-the-integration)

* * *
