# Kilo Code 模型选择指南 | Kilo Code Docs

[跳转到主要内容](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/model-selection-guide#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

目录

最后更新：2025年9月3日。

AI 模型领域发展迅速，因此本指南重点介绍目前在 Kilo Code 中表现优异的模型。我们会定期更新，以反映新模型的出现和性能变化。

Kilo Code 表现最佳者[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/model-selection-guide#kilo-code-%E8%A1%A8%E7%8E%B0%E6%9C%80%E4%BD%B3%E8%80%85 "Kilo Code 表现最佳者的链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 模型  | 上下文窗口 | SWE-Bench 验证 | 人工评估 | LiveCodeBench | 输入价格\* | 输出价格\* | 最佳用途 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **GPT-5** | 400K tokens | 74.9% | 96.3% | 68.2% | $1.25 | $10 | 最新功能，多模态编码 |
| **Claude Sonnet 4** | 1M tokens | 72.7% | 94.8% | 65.9% | $3-6 | $15-22.50 | 企业级代码生成，复杂系统 |
| **Grok Code Fast 1** | 256K tokens | 70.8% | 92.1% | 63.4% | $0.75 | $3.50 | 快速开发，性价比平衡 |
| **Qwen3 Coder** | 256K tokens | 68.4% | 91.7% | 61.8% | $0.20 | $0.80 | 纯编码任务，快速原型开发 |
| **Gemini 2.5 Pro** | 1M+ tokens | 67.2% | 89.9% | 59.3% | TBD | TBD | 大型代码库，架构规划 |

\*每百万 tokens

高性价比选项[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/model-selection-guide#%E9%AB%98%E6%80%A7%E4%BB%B7%E6%AF%94%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9 "高性价比选项的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 模型  | 上下文窗口 | SWE-Bench 验证 | 人工评估 | LiveCodeBench | 输入价格\* | 输出价格\* | 说明  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **DeepSeek V3** | 128K tokens | 64.1% | 87.3% | 56.7% | $0.14 | $0.28 | 日常编码的超高性价比 |
| **DeepSeek R1** | 128K tokens | 62.8% | 85.9% | 54.2% | $0.55 | $2.19 | 预算价格下的高级推理能力 |
| **Qwen3 32B** | 128K tokens | 60.3% | 83.4% | 52.1% | Varies | Varies | 开源灵活性 |
| **Z AI GLM 4.5** | 128K tokens | 58.7% | 81.2% | 49.8% | TBD | TBD | MIT 许可，混合推理系统 |

\*每百万 tokens

全面评估框架[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/model-selection-guide#%E5%85%A8%E9%9D%A2%E8%AF%84%E4%BC%B0%E6%A1%86%E6%9E%B6 "全面评估框架的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 延迟性能[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/model-selection-guide#%E5%BB%B6%E8%BF%9F%E6%80%A7%E8%83%BD "延迟性能的链接")

响应时间显著影响开发流程和生产力：

*   **超快 (< 2秒)**：Grok Code Fast 1，Qwen3 Coder
*   **快速 (2-4秒)**：DeepSeek V3，GPT-5
*   **中等 (4-8秒)**：Claude Sonnet 4，DeepSeek R1
*   **较慢 (8-15秒)**：Gemini 2.5 Pro，Z AI GLM 4.5

**对开发的影响**：超快模型支持实时编码辅助和即时反馈循环。延迟超过 8 秒的模型可能会打断心流状态，但在处理复杂架构决策时可能仍然可以接受。

### 吞吐量分析[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/model-selection-guide#%E5%90%9E%E5%90%90%E9%87%8F%E5%88%86%E6%9E%90 "吞吐量分析的链接")

Token 生成速率影响大型代码库的处理：

*   **高吞吐量 (150+ tokens/s)**：GPT-5，Grok Code Fast 1
*   **中吞吐量 (100-150 tokens/s)**：Claude Sonnet 4，Qwen3 Coder
*   **标准吞吐量 (50-100 tokens/s)**：DeepSeek 模型，Gemini 2.5 Pro
*   **可变吞吐量**：开源模型依赖基础设施

**扩展因素**：高吞吐量模型在生成大量文档、重构大型文件或批量处理多个组件时表现出色。

### 可靠性与可用性[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/model-selection-guide#%E5%8F%AF%E9%9D%A0%E6%80%A7%E4%B8%8E%E5%8F%AF%E7%94%A8%E6%80%A7 "可靠性与可用性的链接")

企业级生产环境的考虑：

*   **企业级 (99.9%+ 正常运行时间)**：Claude Sonnet 4，GPT-5，Gemini 2.5 Pro
*   **生产就绪 (99%+ 正常运行时间)**：Qwen3 Coder，Grok Code Fast 1
*   **可靠性发展中**：DeepSeek 模型，Z AI GLM 4.5
*   **自托管**：Qwen3 32B（可靠性取决于您的基础设施）

**成功率**：企业级模型保持一致的输出质量并更优雅地处理边缘情况，而预算选项可能需要额外的验证步骤。

### 上下文窗口策略[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/model-selection-guide#%E4%B8%8A%E4%B8%8B%E6%96%87%E7%AA%97%E5%8F%A3%E7%AD%96%E7%95%A5 "上下文窗口策略的链接")

针对不同项目规模的优化：

| 大小  | 字数估算 | 典型用例 | 推荐模型 | 策略  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **32K tokens** | ~24,000 words | 单个组件、脚本 | DeepSeek V3, Qwen3 Coder | 专注于单文件优化 |
| **128K tokens** | ~96,000 words | 标准应用程序、大多数项目 | 所有预算模型, Grok Code Fast 1 | 多文件上下文，中等复杂度 |
| **256K tokens** | ~192,000 words | 大型应用程序、多个服务 | Qwen3 Coder, Grok Code Fast 1 | 完整功能上下文，服务集成 |
| **400K+ tokens** | ~300,000+ words | 企业系统、全栈应用 | GPT-5, Claude Sonnet 4, Gemini 2.5 Pro | 架构概览，系统级重构 |

**性能下降**：无论宣传的限制如何，模型的有效性通常在超过 400-500K tokens 后显著下降。请相应规划上下文使用。

社区选择[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/model-selection-guide#%E7%A4%BE%E5%8C%BA%E9%80%89%E6%8B%A9 "社区选择的链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

AI 模型领域变化迅速，要保持更新，请查看 [**👉 Kilo Code 在 OpenRouter 上的社区最爱**](https://openrouter.ai/apps?url=https%3A%2F%2Fkilocode.ai%2F)

*   [Kilo Code 表现最佳者](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/model-selection-guide#kilo-code-%E8%A1%A8%E7%8E%B0%E6%9C%80%E4%BD%B3%E8%80%85)
    
*   [高性价比选项](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/model-selection-guide#%E9%AB%98%E6%80%A7%E4%BB%B7%E6%AF%94%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9)
    
*   [全面评估框架](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/model-selection-guide#%E5%85%A8%E9%9D%A2%E8%AF%84%E4%BC%B0%E6%A1%86%E6%9E%B6)
    *   [延迟性能](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/model-selection-guide#%E5%BB%B6%E8%BF%9F%E6%80%A7%E8%83%BD)
        
    *   [吞吐量分析](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/model-selection-guide#%E5%90%9E%E5%90%90%E9%87%8F%E5%88%86%E6%9E%90)
        
    *   [可靠性与可用性](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/model-selection-guide#%E5%8F%AF%E9%9D%A0%E6%80%A7%E4%B8%8E%E5%8F%AF%E7%94%A8%E6%80%A7)
        
    *   [上下文窗口策略](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/model-selection-guide#%E4%B8%8A%E4%B8%8B%E6%96%87%E7%AA%97%E5%8F%A3%E7%AD%96%E7%95%A5)
        
*   [社区选择](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/model-selection-guide#%E7%A4%BE%E5%8C%BA%E9%80%89%E6%8B%A9)
    

* * *

Is this documentation incorrect or incomplete? [Report an issue on GitHub](https://github.com/Kilo-Org/kilocode/tree/main/apps/kilocode-docs/issues/new?title=Documentation%20Issue:%20%2Fdocs%2Fzh-CN%2Fbasic-usage%2Fmodel-selection-guide)

# 设置 Mistral 免费自动补全 | Kilo Code Docs

[跳转到主要内容](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete/mistral-setup#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

目录

本指南将引导您在 Kilo Code 中设置 Mistral 的 Codestral 模型以获得免费的自动补全功能。Mistral 提供免费套餐，非常适合开始使用 AI 驱动的代码补全。

视频教程[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete/mistral-setup#%E8%A7%86%E9%A2%91%E6%95%99%E7%A8%8B "视频教程的链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

您的浏览器不支持视频标签。

步骤 1：打开 Kilo Code 设置[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete/mistral-setup#%E6%AD%A5%E9%AA%A4-1%E6%89%93%E5%BC%80-kilo-code-%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE "步骤 1：打开 Kilo Code 设置的链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

在 VS Code 中，打开 Kilo Code 面板，点击右上角的**设置**图标（齿轮）。

![打开 Kilo Code 设置](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/assets/images/01-open-kilo-code-settings-538f93dfa93fc26dfa97f9500f0259ee.png)

步骤 2：添加新的配置文件[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete/mistral-setup#%E6%AD%A5%E9%AA%A4-2%E6%B7%BB%E5%8A%A0%E6%96%B0%E7%9A%84%E9%85%8D%E7%BD%AE%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6 "步骤 2：添加新的配置文件的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

导航到**设置 → 提供商**，点击**添加配置文件**为 Mistral 创建新的配置文件。

![添加配置文件](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/assets/images/02-add-configuration-profile-0e1a101a7471d08bfa1e804a7f4a4e44.png)

步骤 3：命名您的配置文件[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete/mistral-setup#%E6%AD%A5%E9%AA%A4-3%E5%91%BD%E5%90%8D%E6%82%A8%E7%9A%84%E9%85%8D%E7%BD%AE%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6 "步骤 3：命名您的配置文件的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

在"新建配置文件"对话框中，输入名称如"Mistral profile"（名称可以是您喜欢的任何内容），然后点击**创建配置文件**。

备注

配置文件名称只是供您参考的标签——它不会影响功能。选择任何有助于您识别此配置的名称。

![创建 Mistral 配置文件](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/assets/images/03-name-your-profile-477926b6d6b8dfc852bb090167048096.png)

步骤 4：选择 Mistral 作为提供商[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete/mistral-setup#%E6%AD%A5%E9%AA%A4-4%E9%80%89%E6%8B%A9-mistral-%E4%BD%9C%E4%B8%BA%E6%8F%90%E4%BE%9B%E5%95%86 "步骤 4：选择 Mistral 作为提供商的链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

在 **API 提供商**下拉菜单中，搜索并选择 **Mistral**。

备注

创建自动补全配置文件时，您无需选择特定模型——Kilo Code 将自动使用为代码补全优化的适当 Codestral 模型。

![选择 Mistral 提供商](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/assets/images/04-select-mistral-provider-826337bad7a48e3ae694fa8b95f4a15a.png)

步骤 5：获取您的 API 密钥[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete/mistral-setup#%E6%AD%A5%E9%AA%A4-5%E8%8E%B7%E5%8F%96%E6%82%A8%E7%9A%84-api-%E5%AF%86%E9%92%A5 "步骤 5：获取您的 API 密钥的链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

您会看到需要有效 API 密钥的警告。点击**获取 Mistral / Codestral API 密钥**打开 Mistral 控制台。

![获取 API 密钥按钮](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/assets/images/05-get-api-key-46b05ff363a326e7eaf63649567c06de.png)

步骤 6：在 Mistral AI Studio 中导航到 Codestral[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete/mistral-setup#%E6%AD%A5%E9%AA%A4-6%E5%9C%A8-mistral-ai-studio-%E4%B8%AD%E5%AF%BC%E8%88%AA%E5%88%B0-codestral "步骤 6：在 Mistral AI Studio 中导航到 Codestral的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

在 Mistral AI Studio 侧边栏中，点击代码部分下的 **Codestral**。

![选择 Codestral](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/assets/images/06-navigate-to-codestral-a3b309317391019a27d957ee4992c2f9.png)

步骤 7：生成 API 密钥[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete/mistral-setup#%E6%AD%A5%E9%AA%A4-7%E7%94%9F%E6%88%90-api-%E5%AF%86%E9%92%A5 "步骤 7：生成 API 密钥的链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

点击**生成 API 密钥**按钮创建您的新 Codestral API 密钥。

![确认生成](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/assets/images/07-confirm-key-generation-06c12bd65f10e940e706e120d8c51e3d.png)

步骤 8：复制您的 API 密钥[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete/mistral-setup#%E6%AD%A5%E9%AA%A4-8%E5%A4%8D%E5%88%B6%E6%82%A8%E7%9A%84-api-%E5%AF%86%E9%92%A5 "步骤 8：复制您的 API 密钥的链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

生成后，点击 API 密钥旁边的**复制**按钮将其复制到剪贴板。

![复制 API 密钥](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/assets/images/08-copy-api-key-6940fe6ef44b10231aac5ee784eb5853.png)

步骤 9：在 Kilo Code 中粘贴 API 密钥[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete/mistral-setup#%E6%AD%A5%E9%AA%A4-9%E5%9C%A8-kilo-code-%E4%B8%AD%E7%B2%98%E8%B4%B4-api-%E5%AF%86%E9%92%A5 "步骤 9：在 Kilo Code 中粘贴 API 密钥的链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

返回 Kilo Code 设置，将您的 API 密钥粘贴到 **Mistral API 密钥**字段中。

![粘贴 API 密钥](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/assets/images/09-paste-api-key-bf5118575b5832fe433f9e749f182df4.png)

步骤 10：保存您的设置[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete/mistral-setup#%E6%AD%A5%E9%AA%A4-10%E4%BF%9D%E5%AD%98%E6%82%A8%E7%9A%84%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE "步骤 10：保存您的设置的链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

点击**保存**应用您的 Mistral 配置。现在您可以使用免费的自动补全了！

![保存设置](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/assets/images/10-save-settings-a9ff35ed2e9cdefc324a326595b7e3ec.png)

后续步骤[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete/mistral-setup#%E5%90%8E%E7%BB%AD%E6%AD%A5%E9%AA%A4 "后续步骤的链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   了解更多关于[自动补全功能](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete)
    
*   探索自动补全的[触发选项](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete#triggering-options)
    
*   查看[最佳实践](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete#best-practices)
    以获得最佳效果

# API 提供商概述 | Kilo Code Docs

[跳转到主要内容](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/connecting-providers#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

目录

**总结**：Kilo Code，像任何代理 AI 编码工具一样，需要 AI 模型提供商才能运行。您可以使用我们的[内置提供商](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/providers/kilocode)
（最简单）或连接来自 **30 多个提供商**的您自己的 API 密钥。

Kilo Code 扩展与 API 提供商[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/connecting-providers#kilo-code-%E6%89%A9%E5%B1%95%E4%B8%8E-api-%E6%8F%90%E4%BE%9B%E5%95%86 "Kilo Code 扩展与 API 提供商的链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 扩展[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/connecting-providers#%E6%89%A9%E5%B1%95 "扩展的链接")

*   您从市场安装的 VS Code 工具
*   处理 UI、文件操作和工作流管理
*   [开源](https://github.com/Kilo-Org/kilocode)
    
*   连接到任何 AI 提供商

### Kilo Code API 提供商[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/connecting-providers#kilo-code-api-%E6%8F%90%E4%BE%9B%E5%95%86 "Kilo Code API 提供商的链接")

*   **内置选项**，随扩展一起提供
*   包含免费积分的 Google 登录
*   无需 API 密钥管理
*   访问前沿编码模型
*   [有竞争力的定价](https://kilo.ai/pricing)
    

**关键点**：该扩展适用于任何提供商——我们的 API 服务只是“包含电池”的选项。

入门：两条路径[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/connecting-providers#%E5%85%A5%E9%97%A8%E4%B8%A4%E6%9D%A1%E8%B7%AF%E5%BE%84 "入门：两条路径的链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 选项 1：内置提供商（推荐）[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/connecting-providers#%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9-1%E5%86%85%E7%BD%AE%E6%8F%90%E4%BE%9B%E5%95%86%E6%8E%A8%E8%8D%90 "选项 1：内置提供商（推荐）的链接")

✅ **快速设置**

*   在 kilo.ai 使用 Google 或 GitHub 登录
*   首次充值包含免费积分
*   无需 API 密钥管理
*   可使用最新模型

→ [完整设置指南](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/providers/kilocode)

### 选项 2：您自己的提供商[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/connecting-providers#%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9-2%E6%82%A8%E8%87%AA%E5%B7%B1%E7%9A%84%E6%8F%90%E4%BE%9B%E5%95%86 "选项 2：您自己的提供商的链接")

**更多控制，更多设置**

1.  从 30 多个受支持的提供商中选择
2.  从您的提供商处获取 API 密钥
3.  在 Kilo Code 设置中配置

为什么要使用多个提供商？[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/connecting-providers#%E4%B8%BA%E4%BB%80%E4%B9%88%E8%A6%81%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E5%A4%9A%E4%B8%AA%E6%8F%90%E4%BE%9B%E5%95%86 "为什么要使用多个提供商？的链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **成本**：比较不同提供商的定价
*   **模型**：访问不同的 AI 功能
*   **可靠性**：停机时的备份选项
*   **功能**：某些提供商提供独家模型
*   **区域**：在某些位置提供更好的性能

本节内容[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/connecting-providers#%E6%9C%AC%E8%8A%82%E5%86%85%E5%AE%B9 "本节内容的链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### [连接您的第一个 AI 提供商](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/getting-started/connecting-api-provider)
[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/connecting-providers#%E8%BF%9E%E6%8E%A5%E6%82%A8%E7%9A%84%E7%AC%AC%E4%B8%80%E4%B8%AA-ai-%E6%8F%90%E4%BE%9B%E5%95%86 "连接您的第一个-ai-提供商的链接")

**面向初学者**：分步设置，包括：

*   推荐的提供商
*   如何获取 API 密钥
*   初始 VS Code 配置
*   开始您的第一个 AI 聊天

### [API 配置配置文件](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/api-configuration-profiles)
[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/connecting-providers#api-%E9%85%8D%E7%BD%AE%E9%85%8D%E7%BD%AE%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6 "api-配置配置文件的链接")

**面向高级用户**：高级管理，包括：

*   多个提供商配置
*   模型切换策略
*   安全的 API 密钥管理
*   任务特定优化

安全注意事项[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/connecting-providers#%E5%AE%89%E5%85%A8%E6%B3%A8%E6%84%8F%E4%BA%8B%E9%A1%B9 "安全注意事项的链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

所有 API 密钥都使用 VS Code 的 Secret Storage——从不以纯文本形式存储。行业标准的安全实践保护您的凭据。

**准备好开始了吗？** → [连接您的第一个提供商](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/getting-started/connecting-api-provider)
或跳转到[高级配置文件](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/api-configuration-profiles)
。

*   [Kilo Code 扩展与 API 提供商](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/connecting-providers#kilo-code-%E6%89%A9%E5%B1%95%E4%B8%8E-api-%E6%8F%90%E4%BE%9B%E5%95%86)
    *   [扩展](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/connecting-providers#%E6%89%A9%E5%B1%95)
        
    *   [Kilo Code API 提供商](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/connecting-providers#kilo-code-api-%E6%8F%90%E4%BE%9B%E5%95%86)
        
*   [入门：两条路径](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/connecting-providers#%E5%85%A5%E9%97%A8%E4%B8%A4%E6%9D%A1%E8%B7%AF%E5%BE%84)
    *   [选项 1：内置提供商（推荐）](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/connecting-providers#%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9-1%E5%86%85%E7%BD%AE%E6%8F%90%E4%BE%9B%E5%95%86%E6%8E%A8%E8%8D%90)
        
    *   [选项 2：您自己的提供商](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/connecting-providers#%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9-2%E6%82%A8%E8%87%AA%E5%B7%B1%E7%9A%84%E6%8F%90%E4%BE%9B%E5%95%86)
        
*   [为什么要使用多个提供商？](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/connecting-providers#%E4%B8%BA%E4%BB%80%E4%B9%88%E8%A6%81%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E5%A4%9A%E4%B8%AA%E6%8F%90%E4%BE%9B%E5%95%86)
    
*   [本节内容](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/connecting-providers#%E6%9C%AC%E8%8A%82%E5%86%85%E5%AE%B9)
    *   [连接您的第一个 AI 提供商](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/connecting-providers#%E8%BF%9E%E6%8E%A5%E6%82%A8%E7%9A%84%E7%AC%AC%E4%B8%80%E4%B8%AA-ai-%E6%8F%90%E4%BE%9B%E5%95%86)
        
    *   [API 配置配置文件](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/connecting-providers#api-%E9%85%8D%E7%BD%AE%E9%85%8D%E7%BD%AE%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6)
        
*   [安全注意事项](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/connecting-providers#%E5%AE%89%E5%85%A8%E6%B3%A8%E6%84%8F%E4%BA%8B%E9%A1%B9)

Is this documentation incorrect or incomplete? [Report an issue on GitHub](https://github.com/Kilo-Org/kilocode/tree/main/apps/kilocode-docs/issues/new?title=Documentation%20Issue:%20%2Fdocs%2Fzh-CN%2Fbasic-usage%2Fconnecting-providers)

# Import, Export, and Reset Settings | Kilo Code Docs

[跳转到主要内容](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/settings-management#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

目录

Kilo Code allows you to manage your configuration settings effectively through export, import, and reset options. These features are useful for backing up your setup, sharing configurations with others, or restoring default settings if needed.

You can find these options at the bottom of the Kilo Code settings page, accessible via the gear icon () in the Kilo Code chat view.

![Export, Import, and Reset buttons in Kilo Code settings](https://kilo.ai/docs/img/settings-management/settings-management.png)

_Image: Export, Import, and Reset buttons._

Export Settings[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/settings-management#export-settings "Export Settings的链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Clicking the **Export** button saves your current Kilo Code settings to a JSON file.

*   **What's Exported:** The file includes your configured API Provider Profiles and Global Settings (UI preferences, mode configurations, context settings, etc.).
*   **Security Warning:** The exported JSON file contains **all** your configured API Provider Profiles and Global Settings. Crucially, this includes **API keys in plaintext**. Treat this file as highly sensitive. Do not share it publicly or with untrusted individuals, as it grants access to your API accounts.
*   **Process:**
    1.  Click **Export**.
    2.  A file save dialog appears, suggesting `kilo-code-settings.json` as the filename (usually in your `~/Documents` folder).
    3.  Choose a location and save the file.

This creates a backup of your configuration or a file you can share.

Import Settings[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/settings-management#import-settings "Import Settings的链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Clicking the **Import** button allows you to load settings from a previously exported JSON file.

*   **Process:**
    1.  Click **Import**.
    2.  A file open dialog appears. Select the `kilo-code-settings.json` file (or similarly named file) you want to import.
    3.  Kilo Code reads the file, validates its contents against the expected schema, and applies the settings.
*   **Merging:** Importing settings **merges** the configurations. It adds new API profiles and updates existing ones and global settings based on the file content. It does **not** delete configurations present in your current setup but missing from the imported file.
*   **Validation:** Only valid settings matching the internal schema can be imported, preventing configuration errors. A success notification appears upon completion.

Reset Settings[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/settings-management#reset-settings "Reset Settings的链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Clicking the **Reset** button completely clears all Kilo Code configuration data and returns the extension to its default state. This is a destructive action intended for troubleshooting or starting fresh.

*   **Warning:** This action is **irreversible**. It permanently deletes all API configurations (including keys stored in secret storage), custom modes, global settings, and task history.
    
*   **Process:**
    
    1.  Click the red **Reset** button.
    2.  A confirmation dialog appears, warning that the action cannot be undone.
    3.  Click "Yes" to confirm.
*   **What is Reset:**
    
    *   **API Provider Profiles:** All configurations are deleted from settings and secret storage.
    *   **Global Settings:** All preferences (UI, modes, approvals, browser, etc.) are reset to defaults.
    *   **Custom Modes:** All user-defined modes are deleted.
    *   **Secret Storage:** All API keys and other secrets managed by Kilo Code are cleared.
    *   **Task History:** The current task stack is cleared.
*   **Result:** Kilo Code returns to its initial state, as if freshly installed, with default settings and no user configurations.
    

Use this option only if you are certain you want to remove all Kilo Code data or if instructed during troubleshooting. Consider exporting your settings first if you might want to restore them later.

*   [Export Settings](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/settings-management#export-settings)
    
*   [Import Settings](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/settings-management#import-settings)
    
*   [Reset Settings](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/settings-management#reset-settings)
    

* * *

Is this documentation incorrect or incomplete? [Report an issue on GitHub](https://github.com/Kilo-Org/kilocode/tree/main/apps/kilocode-docs/issues/new?title=Documentation%20Issue:%20%2Fdocs%2Fzh-CN%2Fbasic-usage%2Fsettings-management)

# Custom Modes | Kilo Code Docs

[跳转到主要内容](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

目录

Kilo Code allows you to create **custom modes** to tailor Kilo's behavior to specific tasks or workflows. Custom modes can be either **global** (available across all projects) or **project-specific** (defined within a single project).

Sticky Models for Efficient Workflow[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#sticky-models-for-efficient-workflow "Sticky Models for Efficient Workflow的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Each mode—including custom ones—features **Sticky Models**. This means Kilo Code automatically remembers and selects the last model you used with a particular mode. This lets you assign different preferred models to different tasks without constant reconfiguration, as Kilo switches between models when you change modes.

Why Use Custom Modes?[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#why-use-custom-modes "Why Use Custom Modes?的链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Specialization:** Create modes optimized for specific tasks, like "Documentation Writer," "Test Engineer," or "Refactoring Expert"
*   **Safety:** Restrict a mode's access to sensitive files or commands. For example, a "Review Mode" could be limited to read-only operations
*   **Experimentation:** Safely experiment with different prompts and configurations without affecting other modes
*   **Team Collaboration:** Share custom modes with your team to standardize workflows

![Overview of custom modes interface](https://kilo.ai/docs/img/custom-modes/custom-modes.png)

_Kilo Code's interface for creating and managing custom modes._

What's Included in a Custom Mode?[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#whats-included-in-a-custom-mode "What's Included in a Custom Mode?的链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Custom modes are defined by several key properties. Understanding these concepts will help you tailor Kilo's behavior effectively.

| UI Field / YAML Property | Conceptual Description |
| --- | --- |
| **Slug** (`slug`) | A unique internal identifier for the mode. Used by Kilo Code to reference the mode, especially for associating mode-specific instruction files. |
| **Name** (`name`) | The display name for the mode as it appears in the Kilo Code user interface. Should be human-readable and descriptive. |
| **Description** (`description`) | A short, user-friendly summary of the mode's purpose displayed in the mode selector UI. Keep this concise and focused on what the mode does for the user. |
| **Role Definition** (`roleDefinition`) | Defines the core identity and expertise of the mode. This text is placed at the beginning of the system prompt and defines Kilo's personality and behavior when this mode is active. |
| **Available Tools** (`groups`) | Defines the allowed toolsets and file access permissions for the mode. Corresponds to selecting which general categories of tools the mode can use. |
| **When to Use** (`whenToUse`) | _(Optional)_ Provides guidance for Kilo's automated decision-making, particularly for mode selection and task orchestration. Used by the Orchestrator mode for task coordination. |
| **Custom Instructions** (`customInstructions`) | _(Optional)_ Specific behavioral guidelines or rules for the mode. Added near the end of the system prompt to further refine Kilo's behavior. |

Import/Export Modes[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#importexport-modes "Import/Export Modes的链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Easily share, back up, and template your custom modes. This feature lets you export any mode—and its associated rules—into a single, portable YAML file that you can import into any project.

### Key Features[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#key-features "Key Features的链接")

*   **Shareable Setups:** Package a mode and its rules into one file to easily share with your team
*   **Easy Backups:** Save your custom mode configurations so you never lose them
*   **Project Templates:** Create standardized mode templates for different types of projects
*   **Simple Migration:** Move modes between your global settings and specific projects effortlessly
*   **Flexible Slug Changes:** Change mode slugs in exported files without manual path editing

### How it Works[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#how-it-works "How it Works的链接")

**Exporting a Mode:**

1.  Navigate to the Modes view
2.  Select the mode you wish to export
3.  Click the Export Mode button (download icon)
4.  Choose a location to save the `.yaml` file
5.  Kilo packages the mode's configuration and any rules into the YAML file

**Importing a Mode:**

1.  Click the Import Mode button (upload icon) in the Modes view
2.  Select the mode's YAML file
3.  Choose the import level:
    *   **Project:** Available only in current workspace (saved to `.kilocodemodes` file)
    *   **Global:** Available in all projects (saved to global settings)

### Changing Slugs on Import[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#changing-slugs-on-import "Changing Slugs on Import的链接")

When importing modes, you can change the slug in the exported YAML file before importing:

1.  Export a mode with slug `original-mode`
2.  Edit the YAML file and change the slug to `new-mode`
3.  Import the file - the import process will automatically update rule file paths to match the new slug

Methods for Creating and Configuring Custom Modes[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#methods-for-creating-and-configuring-custom-modes "Methods for Creating and Configuring Custom Modes的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

You can create and configure custom modes in several ways:

### 1\. Ask Kilo! (Recommended)[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#1-ask-kilo-recommended "1. Ask Kilo! (Recommended)的链接")

You can quickly create a basic custom mode by asking Kilo Code to do it for you. For example:

    Create a new mode called "Documentation Writer". It should only be able to read files and write Markdown files.

Kilo Code will guide you through the process, prompting for necessary information and creating the mode using the preferred YAML format.

### 2\. Using the Prompts Tab[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#2-using-the-prompts-tab "2. Using the Prompts Tab的链接")

1.  **Open Prompts Tab:** Click the icon in the Kilo Code top menu bar
2.  **Create New Mode:** Click the button to the right of the Modes heading
3.  **Fill in Fields:**

![Custom mode creation interface in the Prompts tab](https://kilo.ai/docs/img/custom-modes/custom-modes-2.png)

_The custom mode creation interface showing fields for name, slug, description, save location, role definition, available tools, custom instructions._

The interface provides fields for Name, Slug, Description, Save Location, Role Definition, When to Use (optional), Available Tools, and Custom Instructions. After filling these, click the "Create Mode" button. Kilo Code will save the new mode in YAML format.

### 3\. Manual Configuration (YAML & JSON)[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#3-manual-configuration-yaml--json "3. Manual Configuration (YAML & JSON)的链接")

You can directly edit the configuration files to create or modify custom modes. This method offers the most control over all properties. Kilo Code now supports both YAML (preferred) and JSON formats.

*   **Global Modes:** Edit the `custom_modes.yaml` (preferred) or `custom_modes.json` file. Access it via Prompts Tab > (Settings Menu icon next to "Global Prompts") > "Edit Global Modes"
*   **Project Modes:** Edit the `.kilocodemodes` file (which can be YAML or JSON) in your project root. Access it via Prompts Tab > (Settings Menu icon next to "Project Prompts") > "Edit Project Modes"

These files define an array/list of custom modes.

YAML Configuration Format (Preferred)[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#yaml-configuration-format-preferred "YAML Configuration Format (Preferred)的链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

YAML is now the preferred format for defining custom modes due to better readability, comment support, and cleaner multi-line strings.

### YAML Example[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#yaml-example "YAML Example的链接")

    customModes:    - slug: docs-writer      name: 📝 Documentation Writer      description: A specialized mode for writing and editing technical documentation.      roleDefinition: You are a technical writer specializing in clear documentation.      whenToUse: Use this mode for writing and editing documentation.      customInstructions: Focus on clarity and completeness in documentation.      groups:          - read          - - edit # First element of tuple            - fileRegex: \.(md|mdx)$ # Second element is the options object              description: Markdown files only          - browser    - slug: another-mode      name: Another Mode      # ... other properties

### JSON Alternative[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#json-alternative "JSON Alternative的链接")

    {	"customModes": [		{			"slug": "docs-writer",			"name": "📝 Documentation Writer",			"description": "A specialized mode for writing and editing technical documentation.",			"roleDefinition": "You are a technical writer specializing in clear documentation.",			"whenToUse": "Use this mode for writing and editing documentation.",			"customInstructions": "Focus on clarity and completeness in documentation.",			"groups": [				"read",				["edit", { "fileRegex": "\\.(md|mdx)$", "description": "Markdown files only" }],				"browser"			]		}	]}

YAML/JSON Property Details[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#yamljson-property-details "YAML/JSON Property Details的链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `slug`[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#slug "slug的链接")

*   **Purpose:** A unique identifier for the mode
*   **Format:** Must match the pattern `/^[a-zA-Z0-9-]+$/` (only letters, numbers, and hyphens)
*   **Usage:** Used internally and in file/directory names for mode-specific rules (e.g., `.kilo/rules-{slug}/`)
*   **Recommendation:** Keep it short and descriptive

**YAML Example:** `slug: docs-writer` **JSON Example:** `"slug": "docs-writer"`

### `name`[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#name "name的链接")

*   **Purpose:** The display name shown in the Kilo Code UI
*   **Format:** Can include spaces and proper capitalization

**YAML Example:** `name: 📝 Documentation Writer` **JSON Example:** `"name": "Documentation Writer"`

### `description`[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#description "description的链接")

*   **Purpose:** A short, user-friendly summary displayed below the mode name in the mode selector UI
*   **Format:** Keep this concise and focused on what the mode does for the user
*   **UI Display:** This text appears in the redesigned mode selector

**YAML Example:** `description: A specialized mode for writing and editing technical documentation.` **JSON Example:** `"description": "A specialized mode for writing and editing technical documentation."`

### `roleDefinition`[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#roledefinition "roledefinition的链接")

*   **Purpose:** Detailed description of the mode's role, expertise, and personality
*   **Placement:** This text is placed at the beginning of the system prompt when the mode is active

**YAML Example (multi-line):**

    roleDefinition: >-    You are a test engineer with expertise in:    - Writing comprehensive test suites    - Test-driven development

**JSON Example:** `"roleDefinition": "You are a technical writer specializing in clear documentation."`

### `groups`[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#groups "groups的链接")

*   **Purpose:** Array/list defining which tool groups the mode can access and any file restrictions
*   **Available Tool Groups:** `"read"`, `"edit"`, `"browser"`, `"command"`, `"mcp"`
*   **Structure:**
    *   Simple string for unrestricted access: `"edit"`
    *   Tuple (two-element array) for restricted access: `["edit", { fileRegex: "pattern", description: "optional" }]`

**File Restrictions for "edit" group:**

*   `fileRegex`: A regular expression string to control which files the mode can edit
*   In YAML, typically use single backslashes for regex special characters (e.g., `\.md$`)
*   In JSON, backslashes must be double-escaped (e.g., `\\.md$`)
*   `description`: An optional string describing the restriction

**YAML Example:**

    groups:    - read    - - edit # First element of tuple      - fileRegex: \.(js|ts)$ # Second element is the options object        description: JS/TS files only    - command

**JSON Example:**

    "groups": [  "read",  ["edit", { "fileRegex": "\\.(js|ts)$", "description": "JS/TS files only" }],  "command"]

### `whenToUse` (Optional)[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#whentouse-optional "whentouse-optional的链接")

*   **Purpose:** Provides guidance for Kilo's automated decision-making, particularly for mode selection and task orchestration
*   **Format:** A string describing ideal scenarios or task types for this mode
*   **Usage:** Used by Kilo for automated decisions and not displayed in the mode selector UI

**YAML Example:** `whenToUse: This mode is best for refactoring Python code.` **JSON Example:** `"whenToUse": "This mode is best for refactoring Python code."`

### `customInstructions` (Optional)[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#custominstructions-optional "custominstructions-optional的链接")

*   **Purpose:** A string containing additional behavioral guidelines for the mode
*   **Placement:** This text is added near the end of the system prompt

**YAML Example (multi-line):**

    customInstructions: |-    When writing tests:    - Use describe/it blocks    - Include meaningful descriptions

**JSON Example:** `"customInstructions": "Focus on explaining concepts and providing examples."`

Benefits of YAML Format[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#benefits-of-yaml-format "Benefits of YAML Format的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

YAML is now the preferred format for defining custom modes due to several advantages:

*   **Readability:** YAML's indentation-based structure is easier for humans to read and understand
*   **Comments:** YAML allows for comments (lines starting with `#`), making it possible to annotate your mode definitions
*   **Multi-line Strings:** YAML provides cleaner syntax for multi-line strings using `|` (literal block) or `>` (folded block)
*   **Less Punctuation:** YAML generally requires less punctuation compared to JSON, reducing syntax errors
*   **Editor Support:** Most modern code editors provide excellent syntax highlighting and validation for YAML files

While JSON is still fully supported, new modes created via the UI or by asking Kilo will default to YAML.

Migration to YAML Format[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#migration-to-yaml-format "Migration to YAML Format的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Global Modes[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#global-modes "Global Modes的链接")

Automatic migration from `custom_modes.json` to `custom_modes.yaml` happens when:

*   Kilo Code starts up
*   A `custom_modes.json` file exists
*   No `custom_modes.yaml` file exists yet

The migration process preserves the original JSON file for rollback purposes.

### Project Modes (`.kilocodemodes`)[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#project-modes-kilocodemodes "project-modes-kilocodemodes的链接")

*   No automatic startup migration occurs for project-specific files
*   Kilo Code can read `.kilocodemodes` files in either YAML or JSON format
*   When editing through the UI, JSON files will be converted to YAML format
*   For manual conversion, you can ask Kilo to help reformat configurations

Mode-Specific Instructions via Files/Directories[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#mode-specific-instructions-via-filesdirectories "Mode-Specific Instructions via Files/Directories的链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

You can provide instructions for custom modes using dedicated files or directories within your workspace, allowing for better organization and version control.

### Preferred Method: Directory (`.kilo/rules-{mode-slug}/`)[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#preferred-method-directory-kilorules-mode-slug "preferred-method-directory-kilorules-mode-slug的链接")

    .├── .kilo/│   └── rules-docs-writer/  # Example for mode slug "docs-writer"│       ├── 01-style-guide.md│       └── 02-formatting.txt└── ... (other project files)

### Fallback Method: Single File (`.kilorules-{mode-slug}`)[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#fallback-method-single-file-kilorules-mode-slug "fallback-method-single-file-kilorules-mode-slug的链接")

    .├── .kilorules-docs-writer  # Example for mode slug "docs-writer"└── ... (other project files)

**Rules Directory Scope:**

*   **Global modes:** Rules are stored in `~/.kilo/rules-{slug}/`
*   **Project modes:** Rules are stored in `{workspace}/.kilo/rules-{slug}/`

The directory method takes precedence if it exists and contains files. Files within the directory are read recursively and appended in alphabetical order.

Configuration Precedence[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#configuration-precedence "Configuration Precedence的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Mode configurations are applied in this order:

1.  **Project-level mode configurations** (from `.kilocodemodes` - YAML or JSON)
2.  **Global mode configurations** (from `custom_modes.yaml`, then `custom_modes.json` if YAML not found)
3.  **Default mode configurations**

**Important:** When modes with the same slug exist in both `.kilocodemodes` and global settings, the `.kilocodemodes` version completely overrides the global one for ALL properties.

Overriding Default Modes[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#overriding-default-modes "Overriding Default Modes的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

You can override Kilo Code's built-in modes (like 💻 Code, 🪲 Debug, ❓ Ask, 🏗️ Architect, 🪃 Orchestrator) by creating a custom mode with the same slug.

### Global Override Example[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#global-override-example "Global Override Example的链接")

    customModes:    - slug: code # Matches the default 'code' mode slug      name: 💻 Code (Global Override)      roleDefinition: You are a software engineer with global-specific constraints.      whenToUse: This globally overridden code mode is for JS/TS tasks.      customInstructions: Focus on project-specific JS/TS development.      groups:          - read          - - edit            - fileRegex: \.(js|ts)$              description: JS/TS files only

### Project-Specific Override Example[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#project-specific-override-example "Project-Specific Override Example的链接")

    customModes:    - slug: code # Matches the default 'code' mode slug      name: 💻 Code (Project-Specific)      roleDefinition: You are a software engineer with project-specific constraints for this project.      whenToUse: This project-specific code mode is for Python tasks within this project.      customInstructions: Adhere to PEP8 and use type hints.      groups:          - read          - - edit            - fileRegex: \.py$              description: Python files only          - command

Understanding Regex in Custom Modes[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#understanding-regex-in-custom-modes "Understanding Regex in Custom Modes的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Regular expressions (`fileRegex`) offer fine-grained control over file editing permissions.

提示

**Let Kilo Build Your Regex Patterns**

Instead of writing complex regex manually, ask Kilo:

    Create a regex pattern that matches JavaScript files but excludes test files

Kilo will generate the pattern. Remember to adapt it for YAML (usually single backslashes) or JSON (double backslashes).

### Important Rules for `fileRegex`[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#important-rules-for-fileregex "important-rules-for-fileregex的链接")

*   **Escaping in JSON:** In JSON strings, backslashes (`\`) must be double-escaped (e.g., `\\.md$`)
*   **Escaping in YAML:** In unquoted or single-quoted YAML strings, a single backslash is usually sufficient for regex special characters (e.g., `\.md$`)
*   **Path Matching:** Patterns match against the full relative file path from your workspace root
*   **Case Sensitivity:** Regex patterns are case-sensitive by default
*   **Validation:** Invalid regex patterns are rejected with an "Invalid regular expression pattern" error message

### Common Pattern Examples[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#common-pattern-examples "Common Pattern Examples的链接")

| Pattern (YAML-like) | JSON fileRegex Value | Matches | Doesn't Match |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `\.md$` | `"\\.md$"` | `readme.md`, `docs/guide.md` | `script.js`, `readme.md.bak` |
| `^src/.*` | `"^src/.*"` | `src/app.js`, `src/components/button.tsx` | `lib/utils.js`, `test/src/mock.js` |
| `\.(css\|scss)$` | `"\\.(css\|scss)$"` | `styles.css`, `theme.scss` | `styles.less`, `styles.css.map` |
| `docs/.*\.md$` | `"docs/.*\\.md$"` | `docs/guide.md`, `docs/api/reference.md` | `guide.md`, `src/docs/notes.md` |
| `^(?!.*(test\|spec))\.(js\|ts)$` | `"^(?!.*(test\|spec))\\.(js\|ts)$"` | `app.js`, `utils.ts` | `app.test.js`, `utils.spec.js` |

### Key Regex Building Blocks[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#key-regex-building-blocks "Key Regex Building Blocks的链接")

*   `\.`: Matches a literal dot (YAML: `\.`, JSON: `\\.`)
*   `$`: Matches the end of the string
*   `^`: Matches the beginning of the string
*   `.*`: Matches any character (except newline) zero or more times
*   `(a|b)`: Matches either "a" or "b"
*   `(?!...)`: Negative lookahead

Error Handling[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#error-handling "Error Handling的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

When a mode attempts to edit a file that doesn't match its `fileRegex` pattern, you'll see a `FileRestrictionError` that includes:

*   The mode name
*   The allowed file pattern
*   The description (if provided)
*   The attempted file path
*   The tool that was blocked

Example Configurations[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#example-configurations "Example Configurations的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Basic Documentation Writer (YAML)[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#basic-documentation-writer-yaml "Basic Documentation Writer (YAML)的链接")

    customModes:    - slug: docs-writer      name: 📝 Documentation Writer      description: Specialized for writing and editing technical documentation      roleDefinition: You are a technical writer specializing in clear documentation      groups:          - read          - - edit            - fileRegex: \.md$              description: Markdown files only      customInstructions: Focus on clear explanations and examples

### Test Engineer with File Restrictions (YAML)[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#test-engineer-with-file-restrictions-yaml "Test Engineer with File Restrictions (YAML)的链接")

    customModes:    - slug: test-engineer      name: 🧪 Test Engineer      description: Focused on writing and maintaining test suites      roleDefinition: You are a test engineer focused on code quality      whenToUse: Use for writing tests, debugging test failures, and improving test coverage      groups:          - read          - - edit            - fileRegex: \.(test|spec)\.(js|ts)$              description: Test files only          - command

### Security Review Mode (YAML)[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#security-review-mode-yaml "Security Review Mode (YAML)的链接")

    customModes:    - slug: security-review      name: 🔒 Security Reviewer      description: Read-only security analysis and vulnerability assessment      roleDefinition: You are a security specialist reviewing code for vulnerabilities      whenToUse: Use for security reviews and vulnerability assessments      customInstructions: |-          Focus on:          - Input validation issues          - Authentication and authorization flaws          - Data exposure risks          - Injection vulnerabilities      groups:          - read          - browser

Troubleshooting[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#troubleshooting "Troubleshooting的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Common Issues[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#common-issues "Common Issues的链接")

*   **Mode not appearing:** After creating or importing a mode, you may need to reload the VS Code window
*   **Invalid regex patterns:** Test your patterns using online regex testers before applying them
*   **Precedence confusion:** Remember that project modes completely override global modes with the same slug
*   **YAML syntax errors:** Use proper indentation (spaces, not tabs) and validate your YAML

### Tips for Working with YAML[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/agent-behavior/custom-modes#tips-for-working-with-yaml "Tips for Working with YAML的链接")

*   **Indentation is Key:** YAML uses indentation (spaces, not tabs) to define structure
*   **Colons for Key-Value Pairs:** Keys must be followed by a colon and a space (e.g., `slug: my-mode`)
*   **Hyphens for List Items:** List items start with a hyphen and a space (e.g., `- read`)
*   **Validate Your YAML:** Use online YAML validators or your editor's built-in validation

# 上下文提及 | Kilo Code Docs

[跳转到主要内容](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/context-mentions#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

目录

上下文提及是一种强大的方式，可以为 Kilo Code 提供项目的具体信息，使其能够更准确高效地执行任务。你可以使用提及来引用文件、文件夹、问题和 Git 提交。上下文提及以 `@` 符号开头。

![上下文提及概览 - 显示聊天界面中的 @ 符号下拉菜单](https://kilo.ai/docs/img/context-mentions/context-mentions.png)

_上下文提及概览，显示聊天界面中的 @ 符号下拉菜单。_

提及类型[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/context-mentions#%E6%8F%90%E5%8F%8A%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B "提及类型的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

![文件提及示例，显示使用 @ 引用文件及其内容出现在对话中](https://kilo.ai/docs/img/context-mentions/context-mentions-1.png)

_文件提及将实际代码内容添加到对话中，以便直接引用和分析。_

| 提及类型 | 格式  | 描述  | 示例用法 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **文件** | `@/path/to/file.ts` | 将文件内容包含在请求上下文中 | "解释 @/src/utils.ts 中的函数" |
| **文件夹** | `@/path/to/folder/` | 以树状格式提供目录结构 | "@/src/components/ 中有哪些文件？" |
| **问题** | `@problems` | 包含 VS Code 问题面板的诊断信息 | "@problems 修复我代码中的所有错误" |
| **终端** | `@terminal` | 包含最近的终端命令和输出 | "修复 @terminal 中显示的错误" |
| **Git 提交** | `@a1b2c3d` | 通过哈希引用特定提交 | "提交 @a1b2c3d 中有什么变化？" |
| **Git 更改** | `@git-changes` | 显示未提交的更改 | "为 @git-changes 建议一条提交消息" |
| **URL** | `@https://example.com` | 导入网站内容 | "总结 @[https://docusaurus.io/](https://docusaurus.io/)<br>" |

### 文件提及[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/context-mentions#%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E6%8F%90%E5%8F%8A "文件提及的链接")

![文件提及示例，显示使用 @ 引用文件及其内容出现在对话中](https://kilo.ai/docs/img/context-mentions/context-mentions-1.png)

_文件提及结合行号引用源代码，以便精确定位。_

| 功能  | 详情  |
| --- | --- |
| **格式** | `@/path/to/file.ts`（始终从工作区根目录开始使用 `/`） |
| **提供** | 包含行号的完整文件内容 |
| **支持** | 文本文件、PDF 和 DOCX 文件（带文本提取） |
| **适用场景** | 初始请求、反馈响应和后续消息 |
| **限制** | 非常大的文件可能会被截断；不支持二进制文件 |

### 文件夹提及[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/context-mentions#%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E5%A4%B9%E6%8F%90%E5%8F%8A "文件夹提及的链接")

![文件夹提及示例，显示目录内容在聊天中被引用](https://kilo.ai/docs/img/context-mentions/context-mentions-2.png)

_文件夹提及以可读的树状格式显示目录结构。_

| 功能  | 详情  |
| --- | --- |
| **格式** | `@/path/to/folder/`（注意尾部的斜杠） |
| **提供** | 使用 ├── 和 └── 前缀的分层树状显示 |
| **包含** | 直接子文件和目录（非递归） |
| **最佳用途** | 了解项目结构 |
| **提示** | 结合文件提及检查特定文件内容 |

### 问题提及[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/context-mentions#%E9%97%AE%E9%A2%98%E6%8F%90%E5%8F%8A "问题提及的链接")

![问题提及示例，显示使用 @problems 引用 VS Code 问题面板](https://kilo.ai/docs/img/context-mentions/context-mentions-3.png)

_问题提及直接从 VS Code 的问题面板导入诊断信息。_

| 功能  | 详情  |
| --- | --- |
| **格式** | `@problems` |
| **提供** | VS Code 问题面板中的所有错误和警告 |
| **包含** | 文件路径、行号和诊断信息 |
| **分组** | 问题按文件组织以提高清晰度 |
| **最佳用途** | 修复错误而无需手动复制 |

### 终端提及[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/context-mentions#%E7%BB%88%E7%AB%AF%E6%8F%90%E5%8F%8A "终端提及的链接")

![终端提及示例，显示终端输出被包含在 Kilo Code 的上下文中](https://kilo.ai/docs/img/context-mentions/context-mentions-4.png)

_终端提及捕获最近的命令输出以便调试和分析。_

| 功能  | 详情  |
| --- | --- |
| **格式** | `@terminal` |
| **捕获** | 最后一条命令及其完整输出 |
| **保留** | 终端状态（不会清除终端） |
| **限制** | 仅限于可见的终端缓冲区内容 |
| **最佳用途** | 调试构建错误或分析命令输出 |

### Git 提及[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/context-mentions#git-%E6%8F%90%E5%8F%8A "Git 提及的链接")

![Git 提交提及示例，显示提交详情被 Kilo Code 分析](https://kilo.ai/docs/img/context-mentions/context-mentions-5.png)

_Git 提及提供提交详情和差异，以便进行上下文感知的版本分析。_

| 类型  | 格式  | 提供  | 限制  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **提交** | `@a1b2c3d` | 提交消息、作者、日期和完整差异 | 仅适用于 Git 仓库 |
| **工作区更改** | `@git-changes` | `git status` 输出和未提交更改的差异 | 仅适用于 Git 仓库 |

### URL 提及[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/context-mentions#url-%E6%8F%90%E5%8F%8A "URL 提及的链接")

![URL 提及示例，显示网站内容被转换为 Markdown 格式出现在聊天中](https://kilo.ai/docs/img/context-mentions/context-mentions-6.png)

_URL 提及导入外部网页内容并将其转换为可读的 Markdown 格式。_

| 功能  | 详情  |
| --- | --- |
| **格式** | `@https://example.com` |
| **处理** | 使用无头浏览器获取内容 |
| **清理** | 移除脚本、样式和导航元素 |
| **输出** | 将内容转换为 Markdown 以提高可读性 |
| **限制** | 复杂页面可能无法完美转换 |

如何使用提及[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/context-mentions#%E5%A6%82%E4%BD%95%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E6%8F%90%E5%8F%8A "如何使用提及的链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1.  在聊天输入框中输入 `@` 以触发建议下拉菜单
2.  继续输入以过滤建议，或使用箭头键导航
3.  按回车键或鼠标点击选择
4.  在请求中组合多个提及："修复 @/src/component.ts 中的 @problems"

下拉菜单会自动建议：

*   最近打开的文件
*   可见的文件夹
*   最近的 Git 提交
*   特殊关键字（`problems`、`terminal`、`git-changes`）

最佳实践[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/context-mentions#%E6%9C%80%E4%BD%B3%E5%AE%9E%E8%B7%B5 "最佳实践的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 实践  | 描述  |
| --- | --- |
| **使用具体路径** | 引用确切文件而非描述它们 |
| **使用相对路径** | 始终从工作区根目录开始：`@/src/file.ts` 而非 `@C:/Projects/src/file.ts` |
| **验证引用** | 确保路径和提交哈希正确 |
| **点击提及** | 点击聊天历史中的提及以打开文件或查看内容 |
| **避免复制粘贴** | 使用提及而非手动复制代码或错误信息 |
| **组合提及** | "使用提交 @a1b2c3d 中的模式修复 @/src/component.ts 中的 @problems" |

*   [提及类型](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/context-mentions#%E6%8F%90%E5%8F%8A%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B)
    *   [文件提及](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/context-mentions#%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E6%8F%90%E5%8F%8A)
        
    *   [文件夹提及](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/context-mentions#%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E5%A4%B9%E6%8F%90%E5%8F%8A)
        
    *   [问题提及](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/context-mentions#%E9%97%AE%E9%A2%98%E6%8F%90%E5%8F%8A)
        
    *   [终端提及](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/context-mentions#%E7%BB%88%E7%AB%AF%E6%8F%90%E5%8F%8A)
        
    *   [Git 提及](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/context-mentions#git-%E6%8F%90%E5%8F%8A)
        
    *   [URL 提及](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/context-mentions#url-%E6%8F%90%E5%8F%8A)
        
*   [如何使用提及](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/context-mentions#%E5%A6%82%E4%BD%95%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E6%8F%90%E5%8F%8A)
    
*   [最佳实践](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/context-mentions#%E6%9C%80%E4%BD%B3%E5%AE%9E%E8%B7%B5)
    

* * *

Is this documentation incorrect or incomplete? [Report an issue on GitHub](https://github.com/Kilo-Org/kilocode/tree/main/apps/kilocode-docs/issues/new?title=Documentation%20Issue:%20%2Fdocs%2Fzh-CN%2Fbasic-usage%2Fcontext-mentions)

# 自动补全 | Kilo Code Docs

[跳转到主要内容](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

目录

Kilo Code 的自动补全功能在您输入时提供智能代码建议和补全，帮助您更快、更高效地编写代码。它提供自动和手动触发选项。

自动补全工作原理[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete#%E8%87%AA%E5%8A%A8%E8%A1%A5%E5%85%A8%E5%B7%A5%E4%BD%9C%E5%8E%9F%E7%90%86 "自动补全工作原理的链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

自动补全分析您的代码上下文并提供：

*   在您输入时提供**内联补全**
*   常见代码模式的**快速修复**
*   基于周围代码的**上下文建议**
*   用于复杂代码结构的**多行补全**

该功能使用您选择的 AI 提供商生成智能建议，与您的编码风格和项目上下文相匹配。

触发选项[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete#%E8%A7%A6%E5%8F%91%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9 "触发选项的链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 代码编辑器建议[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete#%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81%E7%BC%96%E8%BE%91%E5%99%A8%E5%BB%BA%E8%AE%AE "代码编辑器建议的链接")

#### 自动触发建议[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete#%E8%87%AA%E5%8A%A8%E8%A7%A6%E5%8F%91%E5%BB%BA%E8%AE%AE "自动触发建议的链接")

启用后，当您暂停输入时，Kilo Code 会自动显示内联建议。这提供了无缝的编码体验，让您在工作时自然地获得建议。

*   **自动触发延迟**：配置停止输入后建议出现的延迟（以秒为单位）
*   默认为 3 秒，但可以向上或向下调整
*   较短的延迟意味着更快的建议，但可能更耗费资源

### 快速任务 (Cmd+I)[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete#%E5%BF%AB%E9%80%9F%E4%BB%BB%E5%8A%A1-cmdi "快速任务 (Cmd+I)的链接")

需要快速更改？快速任务特性允许您：

1.  在编辑器中选择代码（或在您想要更改的位置放置光标）
2.  按 `Cmd+I`（Mac）或 `Ctrl+I`（Windows/Linux）
3.  用简单的文字描述您的目标
4.  在不进入聊天的情况下接收代码建议

**示例：**

*   "创建具有这些属性的 React 组件"
*   "为这个函数添加错误处理"
*   "转换为 TypeScript"
*   "优化此循环以提高性能"

您可以在 VS Code 的键盘快捷键设置中自定义键盘快捷键。

#### 按快捷键触发建议 (Cmd+L)[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete#%E6%8C%89%E5%BF%AB%E6%8D%B7%E9%94%AE%E8%A7%A6%E5%8F%91%E5%BB%BA%E8%AE%AE-cmdl "按快捷键触发建议 (Cmd+L)的链接")

为了更好地控制建议出现的时机：

1.  将光标放在需要帮助的位置
2.  按 `Cmd+L`（Mac）或 `Ctrl+L`（Windows/Linux）
3.  Kilo Code 分析周围上下文
4.  立即接收改进或补全

这非常适合：

*   快速修复
*   代码补全
*   重构建议
*   让你的心流不被打断

您也可以在 VS Code 设置中自定义此键盘快捷键。

### 聊天建议[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete#%E8%81%8A%E5%A4%A9%E5%BB%BA%E8%AE%AE "聊天建议的链接")

#### 启用聊天自动补全[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete#%E5%90%AF%E7%94%A8%E8%81%8A%E5%A4%A9%E8%87%AA%E5%8A%A8%E8%A1%A5%E5%85%A8 "启用聊天自动补全的链接")

启用后，Kilo Code 会在您输入聊天内容时建议补全。按 Tab 接受建议。

禁用竞争对手的自动补全[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete#%E7%A6%81%E7%94%A8%E7%AB%9E%E4%BA%89%E5%AF%B9%E6%89%8B%E7%9A%84%E8%87%AA%E5%8A%A8%E8%A1%A5%E5%85%A8 "禁用竞争对手的自动补全的链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

我们建议禁用竞争对手的自动补全以优化您使用 Kilo Code 的体验。要禁用 VSCode 中的 GitHub Copilot 自动补全，请转到**设置**并导航到**GitHub** > **Copilot: Advanced**（或搜索"copilot"）。

然后，切换为'禁用'：

![在 VSCode 中禁用 GitHub Copilot](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/60c69417-1d1c-4a48-9820-5390c30ae25c)

如果你使用 Cursor，请转到**设置** > **Cursor 设置** > **Tab**，并关闭"Cursor Tab"：

![禁用 Cursor 自动补全](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/fd2eeae2-f770-40ca-8a72-a9d5a1c17d47)

最佳实践[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete#%E6%9C%80%E4%BD%B3%E5%AE%9E%E8%B7%B5 "最佳实践的链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1.  **平衡速度和质量**：更快的模型提供更快的建议，但可能不太准确
2.  **调整触发延迟**：在灵敏度和避免过多 API 调用之间找到最佳平衡点
3.  **使用快速任务进行复杂更改**：它专为更实质性的代码修改而设计
4.  **使用手动自动补全确保精确**：当您需要在特定时刻获得建议时
5.  **明智地配置提供商**：考虑使用更快、更便宜的模型进行自动补全，同时保留更强大的模型用于聊天

提示[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete#%E6%8F%90%E7%A4%BA "提示的链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   自动补全在结构清晰、组织良好的代码中效果最佳
*   函数上方的注释有助于自动补全理解意图
*   变量和函数名称很重要 - 描述性名称会带来更好的建议

相关功能[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete#%E7%9B%B8%E5%85%B3%E5%8A%9F%E8%83%BD "相关功能的链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   [代码操作](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/code-actions)
     - 用于常见编码任务的上下文菜单选项

*   [自动补全工作原理](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete#%E8%87%AA%E5%8A%A8%E8%A1%A5%E5%85%A8%E5%B7%A5%E4%BD%9C%E5%8E%9F%E7%90%86)
    
*   [触发选项](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete#%E8%A7%A6%E5%8F%91%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9)
    *   [代码编辑器建议](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete#%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81%E7%BC%96%E8%BE%91%E5%99%A8%E5%BB%BA%E8%AE%AE)
        
    *   [快速任务 (Cmd+I)](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete#%E5%BF%AB%E9%80%9F%E4%BB%BB%E5%8A%A1-cmdi)
        
    *   [聊天建议](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete#%E8%81%8A%E5%A4%A9%E5%BB%BA%E8%AE%AE)
        
*   [禁用竞争对手的自动补全](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete#%E7%A6%81%E7%94%A8%E7%AB%9E%E4%BA%89%E5%AF%B9%E6%89%8B%E7%9A%84%E8%87%AA%E5%8A%A8%E8%A1%A5%E5%85%A8)
    
*   [最佳实践](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete#%E6%9C%80%E4%BD%B3%E5%AE%9E%E8%B7%B5)
    
*   [提示](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/autocomplete#%E6%8F%90%E7%A4%BA)

# JetBrains Plugin Troubleshooting | Kilo Code Docs

[跳转到主要内容](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/jetbrains-troubleshooting#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

目录

This guide covers common issues when using Kilo Code in JetBrains IDEs (IntelliJ IDEA, Android Studio, WebStorm, PyCharm, etc.).

Known Missing Features[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/jetbrains-troubleshooting#known-missing-features "Known Missing Features的链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The following features, available in the VS Code version of Kilo Code, are not currently implemented in the JetBrains version:

*   **Autocomplete/QuickTasks**
*   **Git Commit Message Generation** This feature is missing but will be added soon!

We're actively working on bringing feature parity between the VS Code and JetBrains versions. Check our [GitHub repository](https://github.com/Kilo-Org/kilocode)
 for updates on development progress.

Node.js Requirements[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/jetbrains-troubleshooting#nodejs-requirements "Node.js Requirements的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Why Node.js is Required[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/jetbrains-troubleshooting#why-nodejs-is-required "Why Node.js is Required的链接")

The JetBrains Kilo Extension requires Node.js to be installed on your system. Node.js is used to run the extension's backend services and handle communication between the IDE and Kilo Code's AI features.

### Installing Node.js[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/jetbrains-troubleshooting#installing-nodejs "Installing Node.js的链接")

Visit the official Node.js website for installation instructions for your platform: [https://nodejs.org/en/download](https://nodejs.org/en/download)

We recommend downloading the **LTS (Long Term Support)** version for stability.

### Verifying Node.js Installation[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/jetbrains-troubleshooting#verifying-nodejs-installation "Verifying Node.js Installation的链接")

After installation, verify that Node.js is properly installed by opening a terminal and running:

    node --versionnpm --version

Both commands should return version numbers.

JCEF (Java Chromium Embedded Framework) Issues[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/jetbrains-troubleshooting#jcef-java-chromium-embedded-framework-issues "JCEF (Java Chromium Embedded Framework) Issues的链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### What is JCEF?[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/jetbrains-troubleshooting#what-is-jcef "What is JCEF?的链接")

JCEF (Java Chromium Embedded Framework) is required for Kilo Code's web-based interface to display properly in JetBrains IDEs. Most JetBrains IDEs include JCEF support by default, but some configurations may need manual activation.

Fixing JCEF Issues by IDE[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/jetbrains-troubleshooting#fixing-jcef-issues-by-ide "Fixing JCEF Issues by IDE的链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Android Studio[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/jetbrains-troubleshooting#android-studio "Android Studio的链接")

JCEF is available in Android Studio but may need to be enabled manually:

1.  **Open Settings/Preferences:**
    
    *   **Windows/Linux:** File → Settings
    *   **macOS:** Help → Find Action...
2.  **Navigate to Boot Java Runtime:**
    
    *   Choose Boot Java Runtime for the IDE...
3.  **Pick a new runtime**
    
    *   Pick one that has "with JCEF" in the name
4.  **Restart Android Studio:**
    
    *   Close and reopen Android Studio for the changes to take effect
5.  **Verify:**
    
    *   Open Kilo Code panel
    *   The JCEF warning should be gone, and the interface should load properly

**Visual Guide:**

![Step-by-step guide showing how to enable JCEF in Android Studio](https://kilo.ai/docs/img/jetbrains/android-studio-jcef-enable.gif)

_This animation shows the complete process of enabling JCEF in Android Studio._

### IntelliJ IDEA[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/jetbrains-troubleshooting#intellij-idea "IntelliJ IDEA的链接")

JCEF should be enabled by default in IntelliJ IDEA. If you see JCEF warnings:

1.  **Update IntelliJ IDEA:**
    
    *   Ensure you're running the latest version
    *   Go to Help → Check for Updates
2.  **Verify JetBrains Runtime:**
    
    *   IntelliJ IDEA should use JetBrains Runtime (JBR) by default
    *   JBR includes JCEF support
3.  **Check Advanced Settings:**
    
    *   Go to File → Settings (Windows/Linux) or IntelliJ IDEA → Preferences (macOS)
    *   Navigate to Advanced Settings
    *   Look for any JCEF-related options and ensure they're enabled

### Other JetBrains IDEs[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/jetbrains-troubleshooting#other-jetbrains-ides "Other JetBrains IDEs的链接")

For WebStorm, PyCharm, PhpStorm, RubyMine, CLion, GoLand, DataGrip, and Rider:

1.  **Update to Latest Version:**
    
    *   Most JCEF issues are resolved in recent versions
    *   Use the built-in updater: Help → Check for Updates
2.  **Verify JetBrains Runtime:**
    
    *   These IDEs should use JetBrains Runtime by default
    *   JBR includes comprehensive JCEF support
3.  **Check Settings:**
    
    *   Go to File → Settings (Windows/Linux) or \[IDE Name\] → Preferences (macOS)
    *   Navigate to Advanced Settings
    *   Enable any JCEF-related options

Authentication Issues[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/jetbrains-troubleshooting#authentication-issues "Authentication Issues的链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Incomplete Kilo Code authentication[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/jetbrains-troubleshooting#incomplete-kilo-code-authentication "Incomplete Kilo Code authentication的链接")

**Important:** The Kilo Code authentication callback requires [JetBrains Toolbox](https://www.jetbrains.com/toolbox-app/)
 to be installed on your system.

#### Why Toolbox is Required[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/jetbrains-troubleshooting#why-toolbox-is-required "Why Toolbox is Required的链接")

When you authenticate with Kilo Code, the browser redirects back to your IDE using a special URL scheme (`jetbrains://`). This URL scheme is **only registered on your system when JetBrains Toolbox is installed**. Without Toolbox:

*   The authentication redirect will fail silently
*   Your browser may show an error like "Cannot open link" or "No application is set to open this link"
*   The token will not be passed back to your IDE

#### Symptoms of Missing Toolbox[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/jetbrains-troubleshooting#symptoms-of-missing-toolbox "Symptoms of Missing Toolbox的链接")

If you're experiencing authentication issues, you may notice:

1.  **Browser doesn't redirect after login** - After entering your credentials, the browser stays on the authentication page or shows an error
2.  **"Open in IDE" prompts don't work** - Links that should open in your JetBrains IDE do nothing
3.  **No logs in the IDE** - The authentication handler never fires because the URL scheme isn't registered

#### Installing JetBrains Toolbox[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/jetbrains-troubleshooting#installing-jetbrains-toolbox "Installing JetBrains Toolbox的链接")

1.  **Download JetBrains Toolbox:**
    
    *   Visit [https://www.jetbrains.com/toolbox-app/](https://www.jetbrains.com/toolbox-app/)
        
    *   Download the installer for your operating system
2.  **Install and Launch:**
    
    *   Run the installer
    *   Launch JetBrains Toolbox
3.  **Retry Authentication:**
    
    *   Return to Kilo Code in your JetBrains IDE
    *   Attempt the authentication flow again
    *   The `jetbrains://` URL should now work correctly

#### Alternative: Manual Token Entry[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/jetbrains-troubleshooting#alternative-manual-token-entry "Alternative: Manual Token Entry的链接")

If you cannot install JetBrains Toolbox, you can manually configure your API provider:

1.  Go to Kilo Code Settings
2.  Select your API provider
3.  Manually enter your API key or authentication token
4.  Save your settings

_For general Kilo Code support and documentation, visit [kilo.ai/docs](https://kilo.ai/docs)
_

*   [Known Missing Features](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/jetbrains-troubleshooting#known-missing-features)

# 与 Kilo Code 聊天 | Kilo Code Docs

[跳转到主要内容](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/the-chat-interface#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

目录

提示

**总结：** Kilo Code 是一个 AI 编码助手，它存在于 VS Code 中。您可以用简单的英语与它聊天，它会为您编写、编辑和解释代码。

快速设置[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/the-chat-interface#%E5%BF%AB%E9%80%9F%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE "快速设置的链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

在 VS Code 的主侧边栏中找到 Kilo Code 图标（![](https://kilo.ai/docs/img/kilo-v1.svg)）。单击它以打开聊天面板。

**找不到面板？** 转到“视图”>“打开视图...”并搜索“Kilo Code”

如何与 Kilo Code 对话[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/the-chat-interface#%E5%A6%82%E4%BD%95%E4%B8%8E-kilo-code-%E5%AF%B9%E8%AF%9D "如何与 Kilo Code 对话的链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**关键见解：** 只需用普通英语输入您想要的内容。无需特殊命令。

![在 Kilo Code 中输入请求的示例](https://kilo.ai/docs/img/typing-your-requests/typing-your-requests.png)

**好的请求：**

    创建一个名为 utils.py 的新文件，并添加一个名为 add 的函数，该函数接受两个数字作为参数并返回它们的和

    在文件 @src/components/Button.tsx 中，将按钮的颜色更改为蓝色

    在 @/src/App.js 中查找变量 oldValue 的所有实例，并将其替换为 newValue

**使请求生效的因素：**

*   **具体** - “修复 `calculateTotal` 中返回不正确结果的错误”胜过“修复代码”
*   **使用 @ 提及** - 使用 `@filename` 直接引用文件和代码
*   **一次一个任务** - 将复杂工作分解为可管理的步骤
*   **包含示例** - 显示您想要的样式或格式

聊天界面[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/the-chat-interface#%E8%81%8A%E5%A4%A9%E7%95%8C%E9%9D%A2 "聊天界面的链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

![带有标注的聊天界面组件](https://kilo.ai/docs/img/the-chat-interface/the-chat-interface-1.png)  
_您需要的一切都在这里_

**基本控件：**

*   **聊天历史记录** - 查看您的对话和任务历史记录
*   **输入字段** - 在此处输入您的请求（按 Enter 发送）
*   **操作按钮** - 批准或拒绝 Kilo 的提议更改
*   **加号按钮** - 开始新的任务会话
*   **模式选择器** - 选择 Kilo 应如何处理您的任务

快速交互[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/the-chat-interface#%E5%BF%AB%E9%80%9F%E4%BA%A4%E4%BA%92 "快速交互的链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**点击操作：**

*   文件路径 → 打开文件
*   URL → 在浏览器中打开
*   消息 → 展开/折叠详细信息
*   代码块 → 出现复制按钮

**状态信号：**

*   旋转 → Kilo 正在工作
*   红色 → 发生错误
*   绿色 → 成功

需要避免的常见错误[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/the-chat-interface#%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E9%81%BF%E5%85%8D%E7%9A%84%E5%B8%B8%E8%A7%81%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF "需要避免的常见错误的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 替代这个... | 尝试这个 |
| --- | --- |
| "Fix the code" | "修复 `calculateTotal` 中返回不正确结果的错误" |
| 假设 Kilo 知道上下文 | 使用 `@` 引用特定文件 |
| 多个不相关的任务 | 一次提交一个重点突出的请求 |
| 技术术语过多 | 清晰、直接的语言效果最好 |

**重要的原因：** 当您像与需要明确指导的聪明队友交谈一样进行交流时，Kilo Code 的效果最佳。

准备好开始编码了吗？打开聊天面板并描述您想要构建的内容！

*   [快速设置](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/the-chat-interface#%E5%BF%AB%E9%80%9F%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE)
    
*   [如何与 Kilo Code 对话](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/the-chat-interface#%E5%A6%82%E4%BD%95%E4%B8%8E-kilo-code-%E5%AF%B9%E8%AF%9D)
    
*   [聊天界面](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/the-chat-interface#%E8%81%8A%E5%A4%A9%E7%95%8C%E9%9D%A2)
    
*   [快速交互](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/the-chat-interface#%E5%BF%AB%E9%80%9F%E4%BA%A4%E4%BA%92)
    
*   [需要避免的常见错误](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/the-chat-interface#%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E9%81%BF%E5%85%8D%E7%9A%84%E5%B8%B8%E8%A7%81%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF)
    

* * *

Is this documentation incorrect or incomplete? [Report an issue on GitHub](https://github.com/Kilo-Org/kilocode/tree/main/apps/kilocode-docs/issues/new?title=Documentation%20Issue:%20%2Fdocs%2Fzh-CN%2Fbasic-usage%2Fthe-chat-interface)
