# 附加功能 | Kilo Code Docs

[跳转到主要内容](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/more-features#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

目录

Kilo Code 的附加功能可简化日常任务并提升使用便利性。

建议回复[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/more-features#%E5%BB%BA%E8%AE%AE%E5%9B%9E%E5%A4%8D "建议回复的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Kilo Code 提供建议回复，让您减少打字时间。

*   提问后，聊天框下方会出现按钮。
*   单击按钮可将其作为您的下一个提示词。

文本转语音[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/more-features#%E6%96%87%E6%9C%AC%E8%BD%AC%E8%AF%AD%E9%9F%B3 "文本转语音的链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

文本转语音（TTS）功能让 Kilo Code 可以朗读回复。

1.  在设置中启用 TTS。
2.  单击任何回复旁边的扬声器图标即可开始收听。

全球语言支持[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/more-features#%E5%85%A8%E7%90%83%E8%AF%AD%E8%A8%80%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81 "全球语言支持的链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Kilo Code 支持 14 种语言：

*   简体中文
*   繁体中文
*   西班牙语
*   印地语
*   法语
*   葡萄牙语
*   德语
*   日语
*   韩语
*   意大利语
*   土耳其语
*   越南语
*   波兰语
*   加泰罗尼亚语

在**高级设置 > 语言**下更改语言。

*   [建议回复](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/more-features#%E5%BB%BA%E8%AE%AE%E5%9B%9E%E5%A4%8D)
    
*   [文本转语音](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/more-features#%E6%96%87%E6%9C%AC%E8%BD%AC%E8%AF%AD%E9%9F%B3)
    
*   [全球语言支持](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/more-features#%E5%85%A8%E7%90%83%E8%AF%AD%E8%A8%80%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81)
    

* * *

Is this documentation incorrect or incomplete? [Report an issue on GitHub](https://github.com/Kilo-Org/kilocode/tree/main/apps/kilocode-docs/issues/new?title=Documentation%20Issue:%20%2Fdocs%2Fzh-CN%2Ffeatures%2Fmore-features)

---

# 代码库索引 | Kilo Code Docs

[跳转到主要内容](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/codebase-indexing#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

目录

代码库索引通过 AI 嵌入实现对整个项目的语义代码搜索。它不是搜索精确的文本匹配，而是理解您查询的_含义_，帮助 Kilo Code 找到相关代码，即使您不知道特定的函数名称或文件位置。

![代码库索引设置](https://kilo.ai/docs/img/codebase-indexing/codebase-indexing.png)

作用[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/codebase-indexing#%E4%BD%9C%E7%94%A8 "作用的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

启用后，索引系统：

1.  **使用 Tree-sitter 解析您的代码**以识别语义块（函数、类、方法）
2.  **使用 AI 模型创建每个代码块的嵌入**
3.  **将向量存储在 Qdrant 数据库中**以进行快速相似性搜索
4.  **为 Kilo Code 提供 [`codebase_search`](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/available-tools/codebase-search)
     工具**以进行智能代码发现

这使得自然语言查询（如“用户身份验证逻辑”或“数据库连接处理”）能够查找整个项目中的相关代码。

主要优点[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/codebase-indexing#%E4%B8%BB%E8%A6%81%E4%BC%98%E7%82%B9 "主要优点的链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **语义搜索**：通过含义查找代码，而不仅仅是关键字
*   **增强 AI 理解**：Kilo Code 可以更好地理解和使用您的代码库
*   **跨项目发现**：搜索所有文件，而不仅仅是打开的文件
*   **模式识别**：查找相似的实现和代码模式

设置要求[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/codebase-indexing#%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE%E8%A6%81%E6%B1%82 "设置要求的链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 嵌入提供商[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/codebase-indexing#%E5%B5%8C%E5%85%A5%E6%8F%90%E4%BE%9B%E5%95%86 "嵌入提供商的链接")

选择以下选项之一来生成嵌入：

**OpenAI（推荐）**

*   需要 OpenAI API 密钥
*   支持所有 OpenAI 嵌入模型
*   默认：`text-embedding-3-small`
*   每批处理多达 100,000 个 token

**Gemini**

*   需要 Google AI API 密钥
*   支持 Gemini 嵌入模型，包括 `gemini-embedding-001`
*   OpenAI 的经济高效替代方案
*   用于代码理解的高质量嵌入

**Ollama（本地）**

*   需要本地 Ollama 安装
*   无 API 成本或互联网依赖
*   支持任何 Ollama 兼容的嵌入模型
*   需要 Ollama 基本 URL 配置

### 向量数据库[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/codebase-indexing#%E5%90%91%E9%87%8F%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E5%BA%93 "向量数据库的链接")

**Qdrant** 是存储和搜索嵌入所必需的：

*   **本地**：`http://localhost:6333`（推荐用于测试）
*   **云**：Qdrant Cloud 或自托管实例
*   **身份验证**：安全部署的可选 API 密钥

设置 Qdrant[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/codebase-indexing#%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE-qdrant "设置 Qdrant的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 快速本地设置[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/codebase-indexing#%E5%BF%AB%E9%80%9F%E6%9C%AC%E5%9C%B0%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE "快速本地设置的链接")

**使用 Docker：**

    docker run -p 6333:6333 qdrant/qdrant

**使用 Docker Compose：**

    version: "3.8"services:    qdrant:        image: qdrant/qdrant        ports:            - "6333:6333"        volumes:            - qdrant_storage:/qdrant/storagevolumes:    qdrant_storage:

### 生产部署[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/codebase-indexing#%E7%94%9F%E4%BA%A7%E9%83%A8%E7%BD%B2 "生产部署的链接")

用于团队或生产：

*   [Qdrant Cloud](https://cloud.qdrant.io/)
     - 托管服务
*   在 AWS、GCP 或 Azure 上自托管
*   带有网络访问的本地服务器，用于团队共享

配置[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/codebase-indexing#%E9%85%8D%E7%BD%AE "配置的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1.  打开 Kilo Code 设置（ 图标）
2.  导航到 **代码库索引** 部分
3.  使用切换开关启用 **“启用代码库索引”**
4.  配置您的嵌入提供商：
    *   **OpenAI**：输入 API 密钥并选择模型
    *   **Gemini**：输入 Google AI API 密钥并选择嵌入模型
    *   **Ollama**：输入基本 URL 并选择模型
5.  设置 Qdrant URL 和可选的 API 密钥
6.  配置 **最大搜索结果**（默认：20，范围：1-100）
7.  单击 **保存** 开始初始索引

### 启用/禁用切换[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/codebase-indexing#%E5%90%AF%E7%94%A8%E7%A6%81%E7%94%A8%E5%88%87%E6%8D%A2 "启用/禁用切换的链接")

代码库索引功能包含一个方便的切换开关，允许您：

*   **启用**：开始索引您的代码库并使搜索工具可用
*   **禁用**：停止索引、暂停文件监视并禁用搜索功能
*   **保留设置**：关闭时您的配置仍会保存

此切换对于在密集开发工作期间或处理敏感代码库时暂时禁用索引很有用。

理解索引状态[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/codebase-indexing#%E7%90%86%E8%A7%A3%E7%B4%A2%E5%BC%95%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81 "理解索引状态的链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

界面显示带有颜色指示器的实时状态：

*   **待机**（灰色）：未运行，等待配置
*   **索引中**（黄色）：当前正在处理文件
*   **已索引**（绿色）：最新且可供搜索
*   **错误**（红色）：失败状态，需要注意

文件处理方式[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/codebase-indexing#%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E5%A4%84%E7%90%86%E6%96%B9%E5%BC%8F "文件处理方式的链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 智能代码解析[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/codebase-indexing#%E6%99%BA%E8%83%BD%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81%E8%A7%A3%E6%9E%90 "智能代码解析的链接")

*   **Tree-sitter 集成**：使用 AST 解析识别语义代码块
*   **语言支持**：Tree-sitter 支持的所有语言
*   **Markdown 支持**：完全支持 markdown 文件和文档
*   **回退**：对于不支持的文件类型，基于行的分块
*   **块大小**：
    *   最小：100 个字符
    *   最大：1,000 个字符
    *   智能拆分大型函数

### 自动文件过滤[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/codebase-indexing#%E8%87%AA%E5%8A%A8%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E8%BF%87%E6%BB%A4 "自动文件过滤的链接")

索引器自动排除：

*   二进制文件和图像
*   大文件（>1MB）
*   Git 仓库（`.git` 文件夹）
*   依赖项（`node_modules`、`vendor` 等）
*   与 `.gitignore` 和 `.kilocode` 模式匹配的文件

### 增量更新[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/codebase-indexing#%E5%A2%9E%E9%87%8F%E6%9B%B4%E6%96%B0 "增量更新的链接")

*   **文件监视**：监视工作区中的更改
*   **智能更新**：仅重新处理修改过的文件
*   **基于哈希的缓存**：避免重新处理未更改的内容
*   **分支切换**：自动处理 Git 分支更改

最佳实践[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/codebase-indexing#%E6%9C%80%E4%BD%B3%E5%AE%9E%E8%B7%B5 "最佳实践的链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 模型选择[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/codebase-indexing#%E6%A8%A1%E5%9E%8B%E9%80%89%E6%8B%A9 "模型选择的链接")

**对于 OpenAI：**

*   **`text-embedding-3-small`**：性能和成本的最佳平衡
*   **`text-embedding-3-large`**：更高精度，成本高 5 倍
*   **`text-embedding-ada-002`**：旧模型，成本较低

**对于 Ollama：**

*   **`mxbai-embed-large`**：最大和最高质量的嵌入模型。
*   **`nomic-embed-text`**：性能和嵌入质量的最佳平衡。
*   **`all-minilm`**：紧凑型模型，质量较低但性能更快。

### 安全注意事项[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/codebase-indexing#%E5%AE%89%E5%85%A8%E6%B3%A8%E6%84%8F%E4%BA%8B%E9%A1%B9 "安全注意事项的链接")

*   **API 密钥**：安全地存储在 VS Code 的加密存储中
*   **代码隐私**：仅发送少量代码片段用于嵌入
*   **本地处理**：所有解析均在本地进行
*   **Qdrant 安全**：在生产环境部署时使用身份验证

当前限制[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/codebase-indexing#%E5%BD%93%E5%89%8D%E9%99%90%E5%88%B6 "当前限制的链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **文件大小**：每个文件最大 1MB
*   **单个工作区**：一次一个工作区
*   **依赖项**：需要外部服务（嵌入提供商 + Qdrant）
*   **语言覆盖**：仅限于 Tree-sitter 支持的语言以实现最佳解析

使用搜索功能[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/codebase-indexing#%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E6%90%9C%E7%B4%A2%E5%8A%9F%E8%83%BD "使用搜索功能的链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

索引后，Kilo Code 可以使用 [`codebase_search`](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/advanced-usage/available-tools/codebase-search)
 工具查找相关代码：

**示例查询：**

*   “用户身份验证如何处理？”
*   “数据库连接设置”
*   “错误处理模式”
*   “API 端点定义”

该工具为 Kilo Code 提供：

*   相关代码片段（最多达到您配置的最大结果限制）
*   文件路径和行号
*   相似度分数
*   上下文信息

### 搜索结果配置[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/codebase-indexing#%E6%90%9C%E7%B4%A2%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E9%85%8D%E7%BD%AE "搜索结果配置的链接")

您可以通过调整 **最大搜索结果** 设置来控制返回的搜索结果数量：

*   **默认**：20 个结果
*   **范围**：1-100 个结果
*   **性能**：较低的值可提高响应速度
*   **全面性**：较高的值提供更多上下文，但可能会减慢响应速度

隐私与安全[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/codebase-indexing#%E9%9A%90%E7%A7%81%E4%B8%8E%E5%AE%89%E5%85%A8 "隐私与安全的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **代码保留在本地**：仅发送少量代码片段用于嵌入
*   **嵌入是数字的**：不是人类可读的表示
*   **安全存储**：API 密钥在 VS Code 存储中加密
*   **本地选项**：使用 Ollama 进行完全本地处理
*   **访问控制**：尊重现有文件权限

未来增强[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/codebase-indexing#%E6%9C%AA%E6%9D%A5%E5%A2%9E%E5%BC%BA "未来增强的链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

计划的改进：

*   附加嵌入提供商
*   多工作区索引
*   增强的过滤和配置选项
*   团队共享功能
*   与 VS Code 本机搜索集成

*   [作用](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/codebase-indexing#%E4%BD%9C%E7%94%A8)
    
*   [主要优点](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/codebase-indexing#%E4%B8%BB%E8%A6%81%E4%BC%98%E7%82%B9)
    
*   [设置要求](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/codebase-indexing#%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE%E8%A6%81%E6%B1%82)
    *   [嵌入提供商](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/codebase-indexing#%E5%B5%8C%E5%85%A5%E6%8F%90%E4%BE%9B%E5%95%86)
        
    *   [向量数据库](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/codebase-indexing#%E5%90%91%E9%87%8F%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E5%BA%93)
        
*   [设置 Qdrant](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/codebase-indexing#%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE-qdrant)
    *   [快速本地设置](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/codebase-indexing#%E5%BF%AB%E9%80%9F%E6%9C%AC%E5%9C%B0%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE)
        
    *   [生产部署](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/codebase-indexing#%E7%94%9F%E4%BA%A7%E9%83%A8%E7%BD%B2)
        
*   [配置](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/codebase-indexing#%E9%85%8D%E7%BD%AE)

*   [理解索引状态](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/codebase-indexing#%E7%90%86%E8%A7%A3%E7%B4%A2%E5%BC%95%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81)

    *   [智能代码解析](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/codebase-indexing#%E6%99%BA%E8%83%BD%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81%E8%A7%A3%E6%9E%90)

# About Kilo Paid Plans | Kilo Code Docs

[跳转到主要内容](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/about#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

目录

Kilo Code accelerates development with AI-driven code generation and task automation. You can use Kilo Code as an open source extension in VS Code or JetBrains IDEs.

Organizations adopting AI accelerated coding at scale often want a better way to monitor, manage, and collaborate on their AI-drive practices.

Kilo Code's paid plans, Teams and Enterprise, are the solution for these organizations.

备注

Purchases of Kilo Code's paid plans are separate from model provider credits.

No credits are included with a Teams or Enterprise plan purchase.

What You Get from Kilo Teams[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/about#what-you-get-from-kilo-teams "What You Get from Kilo Teams的链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Zero markup** on AI provider costs - pay exactly what providers charge
*   **No rate limiting** or quality degradation during peak usage
*   **Centralized billing** - one invoice for your whole team
*   **Complete transparency** - see every request, cost, and usage pattern
*   **Team management** - roles, permissions, and usage controls
*   **AI Adoption Score** - see how well your team is using AI to accelerate development

**Cost:** $15 per user per month

What You Get from Kilo Enterprise[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/about#what-you-get-from-kilo-enterprise "What You Get from Kilo Enterprise的链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Everything from Teams** plus...

*   **Limit models and/or providers** to control costs and ensure compliance
*   **Audit Logs** for enhanced observability
*   **SSO, OIDC, & SCIM support**
*   **SLA commitments** for support issues
*   **Dedicated support channels** for private, direct communication

**Cost:** $150 per user per month

*   [What You Get from Kilo Teams](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/about#what-you-get-from-kilo-teams)
    
*   [What You Get from Kilo Enterprise](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/about#what-you-get-from-kilo-enterprise)
    

* * *

Is this documentation incorrect or incomplete? [Report an issue on GitHub](https://github.com/Kilo-Org/kilocode/tree/main/apps/kilocode-docs/issues/new?title=Documentation%20Issue:%20%2Fdocs%2Fzh-CN%2Fplans%2Fabout)

# Seats Dashboard | Kilo Code Docs

[跳转到主要内容](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/dashboard#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

目录

The Kilo seats dashboard is the first screen that comes up when you visit [the Kilo Code web app](https://app.kilo.ai/)
. It provides complete visibility into your team's AI usage, costs, and management.

![Invite your team members](https://kilo.ai/docs/img/teams/dashboard.png)

Dashboard Navigation[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/dashboard#dashboard-navigation "Dashboard Navigation的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The dashboard is organized into tabs, each serving specific management needs:

*   **Organization** - Team composition and quick actions
*   **Usage** - Real-time analytics and cost tracking
*   **Billing** - Financial management and invoicing
*   **Subscriptions** - Plan management and seat allocation
*   **Providers and models** (Enterprise Only) - Model availability and management
*   **Single Sign-On (SSO)** (Enterprise Only) - Add or modify SSO settings

Organization Tab[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/dashboard#organization-tab "Organization Tab的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Your central hub for team management and organization overview.

### Key Information Display[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/dashboard#key-information-display "Key Information Display的链接")

*   **Organization name** and creation date
*   **Current seat usage** (e.g., "8 of 10 seats used")
*   **Active members count** with role breakdown
*   **Data collection policy** status

### Team Member List[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/dashboard#team-member-list "Team Member List的链接")

View all team members with:

*   Name and email address
*   Current role (Owner, Admin, Member)
*   Last activity timestamp

### Quick Actions[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/dashboard#quick-actions "Quick Actions的链接")

*   **Buy Credits** - Direct link to credit purchase
*   **Invite Member** - Send team invitations
*   **Manage Seats** - Adjust subscription size
*   **Policy Settings** - Configure data collection preferences

### Data Collection Controls[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/dashboard#data-collection-controls "Data Collection Controls的链接")

Toggle organization-wide policies:

*   **Code training opt-out** - Prevent AI providers from using your code for training
*   **Usage analytics** - Control internal usage tracking

Usage Tab[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/dashboard#usage-tab "Usage Tab的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Real-time visibility into your team's AI consumption and costs.

### Overview Metrics[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/dashboard#overview-metrics "Overview Metrics的链接")

*   **Total spend** (current billing period)
*   **Request count** (successful AI requests)
*   **Average cost per request**
*   **Token usage** (input/output breakdown)
*   **Active users** (users with activity in last 7 days)

### Model Popularity[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/dashboard#model-popularity "Model Popularity的链接")

Visual breakdown showing:

*   Most-used AI models by request count
*   Cost distribution across different models
*   Provider usage patterns
*   Model performance metrics

### Time-Based Analytics[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/dashboard#time-based-analytics "Time-Based Analytics的链接")

Interactive graphs displaying:

*   **Daily usage trends** - Spot peak usage periods
*   **Weekly patterns** - Understand team workflows
*   **Monthly comparisons** - Track growth and optimization

### User-Level Insights[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/dashboard#user-level-insights "User-Level Insights的链接")

*   Individual usage statistics (Owners and Admins only)
*   Top users by request volume
*   Usage distribution across team members

Billing Tab[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/dashboard#billing-tab "Billing Tab的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Complete financial management for your Kilo Teams subscription.

*   **Available credits** remaining
*   **Downloadable invoices** for expense reporting
*   **Payment status** for each billing cycle
*   **Primary payment method** on file
*   **Payment history** with transaction details

### Purchase History[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/dashboard#purchase-history "Purchase History的链接")

*   **Credit purchases** with timestamps
*   **Subscription changes** (seat additions/removals)
*   **Refunds and adjustments** (if any)
*   **Promotional credits** applied

Subscriptions Tab[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/dashboard#subscriptions-tab "Subscriptions Tab的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Manage your Kilo Teams plan and seat allocation.

### Current Plan Details[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/dashboard#current-plan-details "Current Plan Details的链接")

*   **Plan type** (Kilo Teams)
*   **Monthly cost** per seat ($15/user/month)
*   **Billing cycle** dates and next charge
*   **Plan benefits** and included features

### Seat Management[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/dashboard#seat-management "Seat Management的链接")

*   **Current seat count** and utilization
*   **Available seats** for new team members
*   **Seat history** showing additions and removals
*   **Cost impact** of seat changes with pro-rating

### Quick Actions[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/dashboard#quick-actions-1 "Quick Actions的链接")

*   **Add seats** for team growth
*   **Remove unused seats** to optimize costs
*   **Change billing frequency** (if available)
*   **Cancel subscription** (with confirmation)

### Billing Cycle Information[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/dashboard#billing-cycle-information "Billing Cycle Information的链接")

*   **Next billing date** and amount
*   **Pro-rating calculations** for mid-cycle changes
*   **Renewal settings** and automatic billing
*   **Cancellation policy** and effective dates

Providers and Models (Enterprise Only)[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/dashboard#providers-and-models-enterprise-only "Providers and Models (Enterprise Only)的链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   Enable/disable models and providers
*   Filter by model Data Policy:
    *   Allows Training
    *   Retains Prompts
    *   Can Publish
*   Extensive other filters:
    *   Location
    *   Input/Output Modalities
    *   Context Length
    *   Pricing

Single Sign-On (SSO) (Enterprise Only)[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/dashboard#single-sign-on-sso-enterprise-only "Single Sign-On (SSO) (Enterprise Only)的链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   Set up SSO if not already configured

Audit Logs (Enterprise Only)[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/dashboard#audit-logs-enterprise-only "Audit Logs (Enterprise Only)的链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   View timestamped user activities across the Organization
*   View total events within dated periods
*   Filter by action time, user, and date

# 快速编辑 | Kilo Code Docs

[跳转到主要内容](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/fast-edits#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

目录

默认设置

Kilo Code 默认启用快速编辑（使用“通过差异启用编辑”设置）。除非您遇到特定问题或想尝试不同的差异策略，否则通常无需更改这些设置。

Kilo Code 提供了一个高级设置，可以使用差异（差异）而不是重写整个文件来更改其编辑文件的方式。启用此功能可带来显著优势。

通过差异启用编辑[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/fast-edits#%E9%80%9A%E8%BF%87%E5%B7%AE%E5%BC%82%E5%90%AF%E7%94%A8%E7%BC%96%E8%BE%91 "通过差异启用编辑的链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

单击齿轮图标 → 高级 打开设置

当选中“**通过差异启用编辑**”时：

![Kilo Code 设置显示通过差异启用编辑](https://kilo.ai/docs/img/fast-edits/fast-edits-5.png)

1.  **更快的文件编辑**：Kilo 通过仅应用必要的更改来更快地修改文件。
2.  **防止截断写入**：系统自动检测并拒绝 AI 写入不完整文件内容的尝试，这可能发生在大型文件或复杂指令中。这有助于防止文件损坏。

禁用快速编辑

如果您取消选中“**通过差异启用编辑**”，Kilo 将恢复为使用 [`write_to_file`](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/write-to-file)
 工具为每次编辑写入整个文件内容，而不是使用 [`apply_diff`](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/apply-diff)
 应用有针对性的更改。这种完全写入的方法通常在修改现有文件时速度较慢，并导致更高的 token 使用量。

匹配精度[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/fast-edits#%E5%8C%B9%E9%85%8D%E7%B2%BE%E5%BA%A6 "匹配精度的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

此滑块控制 AI 识别的代码部分在应用更改之前必须与文件中实际代码匹配的紧密程度。

![Kilo Code 设置显示通过差异启用编辑复选框和匹配精度滑块](https://kilo.ai/docs/img/fast-edits/fast-edits-4.png)

*   **100%（默认）**：需要精确匹配。这是最安全的选择，可最大程度地降低错误更改的风险。
*   **较低值（80%-99%）**：允许“模糊”匹配。即使代码部分与 AI 预期有细微差异，Kilo 也可以应用更改。这在文件略有修改时很有用，但**增加了**在错误位置应用更改的风险。

**请极其谨慎地使用低于 100% 的值。** 较低的精度可能偶尔是必要的，但请务必仔细审查提议的更改。

在内部，此设置调整用于比较代码相似性的 `fuzzyMatchThreshold`（例如 Levenshtein 距离）算法。

*   [通过差异启用编辑](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/fast-edits#%E9%80%9A%E8%BF%87%E5%B7%AE%E5%BC%82%E5%90%AF%E7%94%A8%E7%BC%96%E8%BE%91)
    
*   [匹配精度](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/fast-edits#%E5%8C%B9%E9%85%8D%E7%B2%BE%E5%BA%A6)
    

* * *

Is this documentation incorrect or incomplete? [Report an issue on GitHub](https://github.com/Kilo-Org/kilocode/tree/main/apps/kilocode-docs/issues/new?title=Documentation%20Issue:%20%2Fdocs%2Fzh-CN%2Ffeatures%2Ffast-edits)

# 足枪式提示：覆盖系统提示 | Kilo Code Docs

[跳转到主要内容](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/footgun-prompting#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

目录

足枪式提示，又称覆盖系统提示，允许高级用户完全替换特定 Kilo Code 模式的默认系统提示。这提供了对 AI 行为的精细控制，但绕过了内置的安全措施。

**足枪** _(名词)_

1.  _(编程俚语，幽默，贬义)_ 任何可能导致程序员自作自受的功能。

> 系统提示覆盖被认为是一种足枪，因为在没有深入理解的情况下修改核心指令可能导致意外或错误的行为，尤其是在工具使用和响应一致性方面。

工作原理[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/footgun-prompting#%E5%B7%A5%E4%BD%9C%E5%8E%9F%E7%90%86 "工作原理的链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1.  **覆盖文件：** 在您的工作区根目录中创建一个名为 `.kilocode/system-prompt-{mode-slug}` 的文件（例如，Code 模式的 `.kilocode/system-prompt-code`）。
    
2.  **内容：** 此文件的内容将成为该特定模式的新系统提示。
    
3.  **激活：** Kilo Code 会自动检测此文件。如果存在，它将替换大多数标准系统提示部分。
    
4.  **保留部分：** 只有核心 `roleDefinition` 和您为该模式设置的任何 `customInstructions` 会与您的覆盖内容一起保留。工具描述、规则和功能等标准部分将被绕过。
    
5.  **构建：** 发送到模型的最终提示如下所示：
    
        ${roleDefinition}${content_of_your_override_file}${customInstructions}
    

访问功能[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/footgun-prompting#%E8%AE%BF%E9%97%AE%E5%8A%9F%E8%83%BD "访问功能的链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

您可以在 Kilo Code UI 中找到选项和说明：

1.  单击 Kilo Code 文本输入框左下角的 MODE 选择器。
2.  单击模式选择列表底部的“编辑...”
3.  展开底部的“**高级：覆盖系统提示**”部分。
4.  单击说明中的文件路径链接将在 VS Code 中打开或创建当前选定模式的正确覆盖文件。

![UI 显示高级：覆盖系统提示部分](https://kilo.ai/docs/img/footgun-prompting/footgun-prompting.png)

主要注意事项和警告[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/footgun-prompting#%E4%B8%BB%E8%A6%81%E6%B3%A8%E6%84%8F%E4%BA%8B%E9%A1%B9%E5%92%8C%E8%AD%A6%E5%91%8A "主要注意事项和警告的链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **目标受众：** 最适合深入了解 Kilo Code 提示系统以及修改核心指令所带来影响的用户。
*   **对功能的影响：** 自定义提示会覆盖标准指令，包括工具使用和响应一致性的指令。如果管理不当，这可能导致意外行为或错误。
*   **模式特定：** 每个覆盖文件仅适用于其文件名中指定的模式（`{mode-slug}`）。
*   **无文件，无覆盖：** 如果 `.kilocode/system-prompt-{mode-slug}` 文件不存在，Kilo Code 将使用该模式的标准系统提示生成过程。
*   **目录创建：** Kilo Code 确保 `.kilocode` 目录存在，然后才尝试读取或创建覆盖文件。

请谨慎使用此功能。虽然它在自定义方面功能强大，但错误的实现可能会显著降低 Kilo Code 在受影响模式下的性能和可靠性。

*   [工作原理](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/footgun-prompting#%E5%B7%A5%E4%BD%9C%E5%8E%9F%E7%90%86)
    
*   [访问功能](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/footgun-prompting#%E8%AE%BF%E9%97%AE%E5%8A%9F%E8%83%BD)
    
*   [主要注意事项和警告](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/footgun-prompting#%E4%B8%BB%E8%A6%81%E6%B3%A8%E6%84%8F%E4%BA%8B%E9%A1%B9%E5%92%8C%E8%AD%A6%E5%91%8A)
    

* * *

Is this documentation incorrect or incomplete? [Report an issue on GitHub](https://github.com/Kilo-Org/kilocode/tree/main/apps/kilocode-docs/issues/new?title=Documentation%20Issue:%20%2Fdocs%2Fzh-CN%2Ffeatures%2Ffootgun-prompting)

# Billing & Kilo Credits | Kilo Code Docs

[跳转到主要内容](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/billing#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

目录

Kilo seats uses a transparent, two-part billing system: a monthly subscription per seat, plus pay-as-you-go Kilo credits with zero markup.

备注

Kilo Code seats purchases of Teams or Enterprise are separate from Kilo credits.

No Kilo credits are included with a Teams or Enterprise purchase.

Organization Credits[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/billing#organization-credits "Organization Credits的链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Organization Owners can purchase Kilo credits on the [Organization dashboard](https://app.kilo.ai/)
.

Organization credits are purchased on behalf of all users in the organization. Every member of the organization can use the credits in the organization's balance with the Kilo Code model provider.

Using organization credits works exactly like spending [individual credits](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/adding-credits)
, except that the credits come from the organization's credit balance, rather than the individuals.

### Buying Organization Credits[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/billing#buying-organization-credits "Buying Organization Credits的链接")

1.  **Navigate to Organization tab** in dashboard
2.  **Click "Buy More Credits"**
3.  **Select credit amount** ($50, $100, $250, $500, $1000+)
4.  **Complete payment** using saved payment method
5.  **Credits available immediately** for team use

### Using Organization Credits[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/billing#using-organization-credits "Using Organization Credits的链接")

Organization members can use organization credits by choosing the correct organization profile in the dropdown in the Profiles tab of the Kilo Code extension.

![Dropdown showing different organizations available](https://kilo.ai/docs/img/teams/org_credits.png)

Managing Seats Subscriptions[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/billing#managing-seats-subscriptions "Managing Seats Subscriptions的链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

In order to add Members to your Kilo Code Organization, you must have seat(s) available for them.

You can purchase more seats at any time during your billing cycle and will pay a pro-rated amount for the number of days left in your billing cycle.

You can remove empty seats at any time. Your next payment will reflect the smaller number of seats.

Your next billing date will not change.

To fill empty seats or remove members ahead of seat deletion, see the [team management](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/team-management)
 page.

### Adding Seats[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/billing#adding-seats "Adding Seats的链接")

1.  **Go to Organization tab**
2.  **Click "Add Seats"**
3.  **Enter number of additional seats**
4.  **Review pro-rated cost** for current billing cycle
5.  **Confirm changes**

### Removing Seats[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/billing#removing-seats "Removing Seats的链接")

1.  **Navigate to Organization tab**
2.  **Click "Remove Seats"**
3.  **Select seats to remove** (must remove team members first)
4.  **Confirm reduction**

To fill empty seats or remove members ahead of seat deletion, see the [team management](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/team-management)
 page.

Invoices[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/billing#invoices "Invoices的链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Invoices for any payment on the Kilo Code platform, for seats or credits, will be available in the Invoices tab.

### Service Suspension[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/billing#service-suspension "Service Suspension的链接")

If payment fails repeatedly:

*   **3-day grace period** to resolve payment issues
*   **Service suspension** after grace period expires
*   **Data retention** for 30 days during suspension
*   **Immediate restoration** upon payment resolution

Next Steps[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/billing#next-steps "Next Steps的链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   [Explore usage analytics](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/analytics)
    
*   [Learn about team roles and permissions](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/team-management)
    
*   [Learn about team management](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/team-management)
    

*   [Organization Credits](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/billing#organization-credits)
    *   [Buying Organization Credits](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/billing#buying-organization-credits)
        
    *   [Using Organization Credits](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/billing#using-organization-credits)
        
*   [Managing Seats Subscriptions](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/billing#managing-seats-subscriptions)
    *   [Adding Seats](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/billing#adding-seats)
        
    *   [Removing Seats](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/billing#removing-seats)
        
*   [Invoices](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/billing#invoices)
    *   [Service Suspension](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/billing#service-suspension)

# Usage Analytics & Reporting | Kilo Code Docs

[跳转到主要内容](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/analytics#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

目录

Using Kilo seats with an Enterprise or Teams subscription provides detailed usage analytics to help you monitor and understand your organization’s AI usage patterns, costs, and activity through the Kilo Gateway provider.

Analytics Dashboard Overview[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/analytics#analytics-dashboard-overview "Analytics Dashboard Overview的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Access your organization’s usage analytics through the **Usage Details** section in your dashboard. The analytics show comprehensive data about your team's usage of the Kilo Gateway provider.

Usage Scope

This usage overview includes all of your usage of the Kilo Gateway provider. It does **NOT** include any usage made via the Kilo Code extension to other, non-Kilo Code providers. You can choose which API provider to use from the extension's main settings page.

Summary Metrics[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/analytics#summary-metrics "Summary Metrics的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The dashboard displays five key metrics at the top:

*   **Total Spent** - Total cost for the selected time period
*   **Total Requests** - Number of API requests made
*   **Avg Cost per Request** - Average cost per individual request
*   **Total Tokens** - Total tokens processed (input + output)
*   **Active Users** - Number of team members who made requests

Time Period Filters[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/analytics#time-period-filters "Time Period Filters的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Select from four time period options to view usage data:

*   **Past Week** - Last 7 days of usage
*   **Past Month** - Last 30 days of usage
*   **Past Year** - Last 365 days of usage
*   **All** - Complete usage history

Usage View Options[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/analytics#usage-view-options "Usage View Options的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Only My Usage Toggle[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/analytics#only-my-usage-toggle "Only My Usage Toggle的链接")

Use the **"Only my usage"** toggle to filter the data:

*   **Enabled** - Shows only your personal usage data
*   **Disabled** - Shows team-wide usage data for all members

### Data Breakdown Views[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/analytics#data-breakdown-views "Data Breakdown Views的链接")

Choose between two data presentation formats:

### By Day View[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/analytics#by-day-view "By Day View的链接")

Shows usage aggregated by date with columns:

*   **DATE** - The specific date
*   **COST** - Total spending for that date
*   **REQUESTS** - Number of API requests made
*   **TOKENS** - Total tokens processed (hover to show input vs. output tokens)
*   **USERS** - Number of active users that date

When viewing team data, you can click on any date row to expand and see individual user breakdowns for that day, showing each team member's usage, cost, requests, and tokens.

### By Model & Day View[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/analytics#by-model--day-view "By Model & Day View的链接")

Shows detailed usage broken down by AI model and date with columns:

*   **DATE** - The specific date
*   **MODEL** - The AI model used (e.g., anthropic/claude-sonnet-4, openai/gpt-4)
*   **COST** - Cost for that model on that date
*   **REQUESTS** - Number of requests to that model
*   **TOKENS** - Tokens processed by that model (hover to show input vs. output tokens)
*   **USERS** - Number of users who used that model

Click on any row to expand and see which specific team members used that model on that date, along with their individual usage statistics.

### By Project View[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/analytics#by-project-view "By Project View的链接")

You can also view usage **by project**.

Project names are automatically parsed from the project's `.git/config` for the remote named `origin` (if there is one).

For example, if the following were in your `.git/config`:

    [remote "origin"]    url = git@github.com:example-co/example-repo.git    fetch = +refs/heads/*:refs/remotes/origin/*

The project name would be `example-repo`.

You can also manually override the project name in the `.kilocode/config.json` file in your project.

To set the project identifier to `my-project`, create a `.kilocode/config.json` file with the following contents:

    {	"project": {		"id": "my-project"	}}

Understanding the Data[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/analytics#understanding-the-data "Understanding the Data的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Model Information[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/analytics#model-information "Model Information的链接")

The analytics track usage across different AI models, showing the specific model identifiers such as:

*   `anthropic/claude-sonnet-4`
*   `openai/gpt-5`
*   `x-ai/grok-code-fast-1`
*   `mistralai/codestral-2508`

### User Attribution[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/analytics#user-attribution "User Attribution的链接")

When viewing team data, you can see:

*   Individual team member usage within expanded rows
*   Email addresses for user identification
*   Per-user cost, request, and token breakdowns

### Cost Tracking[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/analytics#cost-tracking "Cost Tracking的链接")

All costs are displayed in USD with detailed precision, helping you:

*   Monitor spending patterns over time
*   Identify high-usage periods or models
*   Track individual team member contributions to costs

Next Steps[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/analytics#next-steps "Next Steps的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   [Manage team billing settings](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/billing)
    
*   [Configure team roles and permissions](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/team-management)
    

The usage analytics provide the insights needed to optimize your team's AI usage while maintaining visibility into costs and activity patterns.

*   [Analytics Dashboard Overview](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/analytics#analytics-dashboard-overview)
    
*   [Summary Metrics](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/analytics#summary-metrics)
    
*   [Time Period Filters](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/analytics#time-period-filters)
    
*   [Usage View Options](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/analytics#usage-view-options)
    *   [Only My Usage Toggle](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/analytics#only-my-usage-toggle)
        
    *   [Data Breakdown Views](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/analytics#data-breakdown-views)
        
    *   [By Day View](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/analytics#by-day-view)

    *   [By Project View](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/analytics#by-project-view)
        
*   [Understanding the Data](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/analytics#understanding-the-data)
    *   [Model Information](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/analytics#model-information)

# Get Started with Kilo Seats in 10 Minutes | Kilo Code Docs

[跳转到主要内容](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/getting-started#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

目录

seats for Kilo in the Teams or Enterprise subscription brings transparent AI coding to your entire engineering organization. No markup on AI costs, no vendor lock-in, complete usage visibility.

Before You Begin[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/getting-started#before-you-begin "Before You Begin的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   Your GitHub account or a Google Workspaces company email
*   Approximate team size for initial seat planning
*   Credit card for billing setup
*   VS Code or a JetBrains IDE installed for team members

Quick Setup Guide[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/getting-started#quick-setup-guide "Quick Setup Guide的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Step 1: Create Your Organization[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/getting-started#step-1-create-your-organization "Step 1: Create Your Organization的链接")

1.  Visit [app.kilo.ai](https://app.kilo.ai/)
    
2.  Sign up using your company Google Workspaces or GitHub account
    *   Note: We recommend starting with your GitHub account rather than a personal Google account, but we can change it later.
3.  Click **Organizations** in the left sidebar and then **Create New Organization**

![Create new organization button](https://kilo.ai/docs/img/teams/create-team.png)

### Step 2: Subscribe to Teams or Enterprise[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/getting-started#step-2-subscribe-to-teams-or-enterprise "Step 2: Subscribe to Teams or Enterprise的链接")

1.  Enter your organization name
2.  Select your initial seat count and tier (Teams or Enterprise)
3.  Complete checkout process

![Create your organization and subscribe](https://kilo.ai/docs/img/teams/subscribe.png)

### Step 3: Invite Your Team[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/getting-started#step-3-invite-your-team "Step 3: Invite Your Team的链接")

1.  Go to your **Organization**
2.  Click **Invite Member**
3.  Enter team member email
4.  Assign roles:
    *   **Owner** - Full administrative access
    *   **Admin** - Team management without billing
    *   **Member** - Standard usage access

![Invite your team members](https://kilo.ai/docs/img/teams/invite-member.png)

### Step 4: Team Members Install Extension[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/getting-started#step-4-team-members-install-extension "Step 4: Team Members Install Extension的链接")

Team members receive invitation emails with these steps:

1.  Accept the team invitation
2.  Install Kilo Code from [VS Code Marketplace](vscode:extension/kilocode.kilo-code)
    
3.  Sign in with their invited email
4.  Start coding with AI assistance

What Happens Next[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/getting-started#what-happens-next "What Happens Next的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Immediate access** to all supported AI models
*   **Real-time usage tracking** in your dashboard
*   **Transparent billing** - see exactly what each request costs
*   **Team analytics** - understand usage patterns and optimization opportunities

![Team usage details page](https://kilo.ai/docs/img/teams/usage-details.png)

First Steps for Your Team[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/getting-started#first-steps-for-your-team "First Steps for Your Team的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1.  **Try basic tasks** - code generation, debugging, documentation
2.  **Explore different modes** - Code, Architect, Ask, Debug
3.  **Set personal preferences** - model selection, auto-approval settings
4.  **Review usage patterns** in the dashboard after first week

Getting Support[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/getting-started#getting-support "Getting Support的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

You can find the dedicated Teams support methods directly on your Organization's page.

Next Steps[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/getting-started#next-steps "Next Steps的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   [Learn about team roles and permissions](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/team-management)
    
*   [Explore the dashboard features](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/dashboard)
    
*   [Set up team management policies](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/team-management)
    

*   [Before You Begin](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/getting-started#before-you-begin)

    *   [Step 4: Team Members Install Extension](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/getting-started#step-4-team-members-install-extension)

# 连接 AI 提供商 | Kilo Code Docs

[跳转到主要内容](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/getting-started/connecting-api-provider#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

目录

Kilo Code 需要 AI 模型提供商的 API 密钥才能运行。

我们推荐以下选项来访问强大的 **Claude 4 Sonnet** 模型：

*   **Kilo Code API 提供商（推荐）：** 以有竞争力的价格提供对 OpenRouter 可用的所有模型的访问权限，并提供免费积分以供入门。 [查看定价](https://kilo.ai/pricing)
    
*   **OpenRouter：** 通过单个 API 密钥提供对多个 AI 模型的访问权限。 [查看定价](https://openrouter.ai/models?order=pricing-low-to-high)
    。
*   **Anthropic：** 直接访问 Claude 模型。需要 API 访问批准，并且可能[根据您的层级有速率限制](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/api/rate-limits#requirements-to-advance-tier)
    。有关详细信息，请参阅 [Anthropic 的定价页面](https://www.anthropic.com/pricing#anthropic-api)
    。

使用 Kilo Code 提供商[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/getting-started/connecting-api-provider#%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8-kilo-code-%E6%8F%90%E4%BE%9B%E5%95%86 "使用 Kilo Code 提供商的链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

默认情况下，当您安装 Kilo Code 扩展时，系统会提示您在 [Kilo Code 提供商](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/providers/kilocode)
中登录或创建帐户。

这将引导您完成帐户设置并_自动_正确配置 Kilo Code 以帮助您入门。如果您更喜欢使用其他提供商，则需要按照以下说明手动获取您的 API 密钥。

使用其他 API 提供商[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/getting-started/connecting-api-provider#%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E5%85%B6%E4%BB%96-api-%E6%8F%90%E4%BE%9B%E5%95%86 "使用其他 API 提供商的链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_即将登陆 Kilo Code Teams 和 Enterprise 平台！_

### 获取您的API密钥[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/getting-started/connecting-api-provider#%E8%8E%B7%E5%8F%96%E6%82%A8%E7%9A%84api%E5%AF%86%E9%92%A5 "获取您的API密钥的链接")

#### 选项1：LLM路由器[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/getting-started/connecting-api-provider#%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B91llm%E8%B7%AF%E7%94%B1%E5%99%A8 "选项1：LLM路由器的链接")

LLM路由器让您可以通过一个API密钥访问多个AI模型，简化了成本管理和模型切换。通常提供[更具竞争力的价格](https://openrouter.ai/models?order=pricing-low-to-high)
。

##### OpenRouter[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/getting-started/connecting-api-provider#openrouter "OpenRouter的链接")

1.  访问 [openrouter.ai](https://openrouter.ai/)
    
2.  使用Google或GitHub账号登录
3.  导航到[API密钥页面](https://openrouter.ai/keys)
    并创建新密钥
4.  复制您的API密钥 - 您需要它来设置Kilo Code

![OpenRouter API密钥页面](https://kilo.ai/docs/img/connecting-api-provider/connecting-api-provider-4.png)

_OpenRouter仪表板，带有"创建密钥"按钮。命名您的密钥并在创建后复制它。_

##### Requesty[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/getting-started/connecting-api-provider#requesty "Requesty的链接")

1.  访问 [requesty.ai](https://requesty.ai/)
    
2.  使用Google账号或电子邮件登录
3.  导航到[API管理页面](https://app.requesty.ai/manage-api)
    并创建新密钥
4.  **重要：** 立即复制您的API密钥，因为它不会再次显示

![Requesty API管理页面](https://kilo.ai/docs/img/connecting-api-provider/connecting-api-provider-7.png)

_Requesty API管理页面，带有"创建API密钥"按钮。立即复制您的密钥 - 它只会显示一次。_

#### 选项2：直接提供商[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/getting-started/connecting-api-provider#%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B92%E7%9B%B4%E6%8E%A5%E6%8F%90%E4%BE%9B%E5%95%86 "选项2：直接提供商的链接")

直接访问特定模型的原提供商，完全使用其功能和特性：

##### Anthropic[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/getting-started/connecting-api-provider#anthropic "Anthropic的链接")

1.  访问 [console.anthropic.com](https://console.anthropic.com/)
    
2.  注册账号或登录
3.  导航到[API密钥部分](https://console.anthropic.com/settings/keys)
    并创建新密钥
4.  **重要：** 立即复制您的API密钥，因为它不会再次显示

![Anthropic控制台API密钥部分](https://kilo.ai/docs/img/connecting-api-provider/connecting-api-provider-5.png)

_Anthropic控制台API密钥部分，带有"创建密钥"按钮。命名您的密钥，设置过期时间，并立即复制它。_

##### OpenAI[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/getting-started/connecting-api-provider#openai "OpenAI的链接")

1.  访问 [platform.openai.com](https://platform.openai.com/)
    
2.  注册账号或登录
3.  导航到[API密钥部分](https://platform.openai.com/api-keys)
    并创建新密钥
4.  **重要：** 立即复制您的API密钥，因为它不会再次显示

![OpenAI API密钥页面](https://kilo.ai/docs/img/connecting-api-provider/connecting-api-provider-6.png)

_OpenAI平台，带有"创建新密钥"按钮。命名您的密钥并在创建后立即复制它。_

### 在VS Code中配置Kilo Code[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/getting-started/connecting-api-provider#%E5%9C%A8vs-code%E4%B8%AD%E9%85%8D%E7%BD%AEkilo-code "在VS Code中配置Kilo Code的链接")

获取API密钥后：

1.  点击VS Code侧边栏中的Kilo Code图标(![](https://kilo.ai/docs/img/kilo-v1.svg))打开Kilo Code侧边栏
2.  在欢迎界面，从下拉菜单中选择您的API提供商
3.  将API密钥粘贴到相应字段中
4.  选择您的模型：
    *   对于**OpenRouter**：选择`anthropic/claude-3.7-sonnet` ([模型详情](https://openrouter.ai/anthropic/claude-3.7-sonnet)
        )
    *   对于**Anthropic**：选择`claude-3-7-sonnet-20250219` ([模型详情](https://www.anthropic.com/pricing#anthropic-api)
        )
5.  点击"Let's go!"保存设置并开始使用Kilo Code

*   [使用 Kilo Code 提供商](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/getting-started/connecting-api-provider#%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8-kilo-code-%E6%8F%90%E4%BE%9B%E5%95%86)
    
*   [使用其他 API 提供商](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/getting-started/connecting-api-provider#%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E5%85%B6%E4%BB%96-api-%E6%8F%90%E4%BE%9B%E5%95%86)
    *   [获取您的API密钥](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/getting-started/connecting-api-provider#%E8%8E%B7%E5%8F%96%E6%82%A8%E7%9A%84api%E5%AF%86%E9%92%A5)
        
    *   [在VS Code中配置Kilo Code](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/getting-started/connecting-api-provider#%E5%9C%A8vs-code%E4%B8%AD%E9%85%8D%E7%BD%AEkilo-code)
        

* * *

Is this documentation incorrect or incomplete? [Report an issue on GitHub](https://github.com/Kilo-Org/kilocode/tree/main/apps/kilocode-docs/issues/new?title=Documentation%20Issue:%20%2Fdocs%2Fzh-CN%2Fgetting-started%2Fconnecting-api-provider)

---

# Single Sign-On (SSO) (Enterprise Only) | Kilo Code Docs

[跳转到主要内容](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/enterprise/SSO#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

目录

Kilo Enterprise lets your organization securely manage access using **Single Sign-On (SSO)**. With SSO enabled, team members can sign in to Kilo using your company’s existing identity provider, such as Okta, Github, Google Workspace, etc.

Why Enable SSO?[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/enterprise/SSO#why-enable-sso "Why Enable SSO?的链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Centralized access control:** Manage permissions through your existing identity provider.
*   **Faster onboarding:** New team members automatically gain access when added to your company directory.
*   **Improved security:** Enforce company-wide password, MFA, and session policies.
*   **Easy offboarding:** Smoothly remove access when users leave your organization.

Prerequisites[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/enterprise/SSO#prerequisites "Prerequisites的链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

You’ll need:

*   Admin or Owner permissions for your Kilo organization.
*   Access to your **Identity Provider (IdP)** (e.g. Okta, Google Workspace, Azure AD).

Step-by-Step Setup[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/enterprise/SSO#step-by-step-setup "Step-by-Step Setup的链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 1\. Open [Organization](https://app.kilo.ai/organizations)
 Dashboard[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/enterprise/SSO#1-open-organization-dashboard "1-open-organization-dashboard的链接")

Find the Single Sign-On (SSO) Configuration panel, and click "Set up SSO":

![Set-up-SSO screen](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/b6ca5f83-4533-4d41-bcb1-0038b645c030)

### 2\. Submit the SSO Request Form[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/enterprise/SSO#2-submit-the-sso-request-form "2. Submit the SSO Request Form的链接")

Fill in your contact information and someone from our team will reach out soon to help you configure SSO.

✅ Next Steps[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/enterprise/SSO#-next-steps "✅ Next Steps的链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

After enabling SSO:

*   Invite new users with their company email domain.
*   Manage team access and roles from the **[Organization](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/dashboard)
    ** tab.
*   View user activity across the team in the **[Audit Logs](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/enterprise/audit-logs)
    ** tab

*   [Why Enable SSO?](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/enterprise/SSO#why-enable-sso)
    
*   [Prerequisites](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/enterprise/SSO#prerequisites)
    
*   [Step-by-Step Setup](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/enterprise/SSO#step-by-step-setup)

# Custom Modes | Kilo Code Docs

[跳转到主要内容](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/custom-modes#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

目录

Custom Modes let you create tailored versions of Kilo’s built-in [modes](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/basic-usage/using-modes)
 for your organization. You can also adjust the settings for Kilo Code's original default modes. You can define a mode’s purpose, behavior, and tool access — helping Kilo adapt to your team’s unique workflows.

For example, Admins and Owners can extend these by creating **Custom Modes** with specialized roles or personalities (e.g. “Documentation Writer” or “Security Reviewer”).

![Create a new custom mode tab.](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/assets/images/custom_modes-1ff3e131cf040afa19cc321a422aefed.png)

Creating a Custom Mode[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/custom-modes#creating-a-custom-mode "Creating a Custom Mode的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1.  Go to **Enterprise/Team Dashboard → Custom Modes**.
2.  Click **Create New Mode**.
3.  Optionally select a **template** (e.g. _User Story Creator_, _Project Research_, _DevOps_).
4.  Fill in the following fields:

| Field | Description |
| --- | --- |
| **Mode Name** | Display name for the new mode (e.g. _Security Reviewer_). |
| **Mode Slug** | A short identifier used internally (e.g. `security-reviewer`). |
| **Role Definition** | Describe Kilo’s role and personality for this mode. Shapes how it reasons and responds. |
| **Short Description** | A brief summary shown in the mode selector. |
| **When to Use (optional)** | Guidance for when this mode should be used. Helps the Orchestrator choose the right mode for a task. |
| **Custom Instructions (optional)** | Add behavioral guidelines specific to this mode. |
| **Available Tools** | Select which tools this mode can access (Read, Edit, Browser, Commands, MCP). |

5.  Click **Create Mode** to save.

Your new mode appears under **Custom Modes** in the Modes dashboard.

* * *

Managing Custom Modes[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/custom-modes#managing-custom-modes "Managing Custom Modes的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Edit:** Click the edit icon to update any field or tool permissions.
*   **Delete:** Click the 🗑️ icon to permanently remove the mode.

*   [Creating a Custom Mode](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/custom-modes#creating-a-custom-mode)
    
*   [Managing Custom Modes](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/custom-modes#managing-custom-modes)
    

* * *

Is this documentation incorrect or incomplete? [Report an issue on GitHub](https://github.com/Kilo-Org/kilocode/tree/main/apps/kilocode-docs/issues/new?title=Documentation%20Issue:%20%2Fdocs%2Fzh-CN%2Fplans%2Fcustom-modes)

# access_mcp_resource | Kilo Code Docs

[跳转到主要内容](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/access-mcp-resource#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

目录

`access_mcp_resource` 工具用于从连接的 Model Context Protocol (MCP) 服务器中检索资源数据。它允许 Kilo Code 访问文件、API 响应、文档或系统信息，为任务提供额外的上下文。

参数[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/access-mcp-resource#%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "参数的链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

该工具接受以下参数：

*   `server_name` (必填): 提供资源的 MCP 服务器名称
*   `uri` (必填): 标识要访问的特定资源的 URI

功能[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/access-mcp-resource#%E5%8A%9F%E8%83%BD "功能的链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

该工具连接到 MCP 服务器并从其暴露的资源中获取数据。与 `use_mcp_tool` 执行操作不同，该工具专门检索为任务提供上下文的信息。

使用场景[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/access-mcp-resource#%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E5%9C%BA%E6%99%AF "使用场景的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   当 Kilo Code 需要从外部系统获取额外上下文时
*   当 Kilo Code 需要从专门的 MCP 服务器访问领域特定数据时
*   当 Kilo Code 需要检索由 MCP 服务器托管的参考文档时
*   当 Kilo Code 需要通过 MCP 从外部 API 集成实时数据时

主要特性[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/access-mcp-resource#%E4%B8%BB%E8%A6%81%E7%89%B9%E6%80%A7 "主要特性的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   从 MCP 资源中检索文本和图像数据
*   在执行资源访问前需要用户批准
*   使用基于 URI 的寻址来精确定位资源
*   与 Model Context Protocol SDK 集成
*   根据内容类型适当显示资源内容
*   支持超时以确保网络操作的可靠性
*   处理服务器连接状态（已连接、连接中、断开连接）
*   发现来自连接服务器的可用资源
*   处理带有元数据的结构化响应数据
*   特殊处理图像内容的渲染

限制[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/access-mcp-resource#%E9%99%90%E5%88%B6 "限制的链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   依赖于外部 MCP 服务器的可用性和连接性
*   仅限于连接服务器提供的资源
*   无法访问已禁用服务器的资源
*   网络问题可能影响可靠性和性能
*   资源访问受配置的超时限制
*   URI 格式由特定的 MCP 服务器实现决定
*   没有离线或缓存的资源访问能力

工作原理[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/access-mcp-resource#%E5%B7%A5%E4%BD%9C%E5%8E%9F%E7%90%86 "工作原理的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

当调用 `access_mcp_resource` 工具时，它会遵循以下流程：

1.  **连接验证**:
    
    *   验证 MCP 中心是否可用且已初始化
    *   确认指定的服务器存在于连接列表中
    *   检查服务器是否被禁用（如果被禁用则返回错误）
2.  **用户批准**:
    
    *   向用户呈现资源访问请求以获取批准
    *   提供服务器名称和资源 URI 以供用户验证
    *   仅在用户批准资源访问后继续
3.  **资源请求**:
    
    *   使用 Model Context Protocol SDK 与服务器通信
    *   通过 MCP 中心向服务器发出 `resources/read` 请求
    *   应用配置的超时以防止服务器无响应时挂起
4.  **响应处理**:
    
    *   接收带有元数据和内容数组的结构化响应
    *   处理文本内容以供用户显示
    *   特殊处理图像数据以适当显示
    *   将处理后的资源数据返回给 Kilo Code 以用于当前任务

资源类型[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/access-mcp-resource#%E8%B5%84%E6%BA%90%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B "资源类型的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

MCP 服务器可以提供两种主要类型的资源：

1.  **标准资源**:
    
    *   具有特定 URI 的固定资源
    *   定义名称、描述和 MIME 类型
    *   无需参数的直接访问
    *   通常表示静态数据或实时信息
2.  **资源模板**:
    
    *   具有 URI 中占位符值的参数化资源
    *   允许基于提供的参数动态生成资源
    *   可以表示查询或数据过滤视图
    *   更灵活但需要额外的 URI 格式化

使用示例[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/access-mcp-resource#%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "使用示例的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   在帮助开发 API 时，Kilo Code 从 MCP 资源中检索端点规范以确保正确实现。
*   在协助数据可视化时，Kilo Code 从连接的 MCP 服务器访问当前数据样本。
*   在特定领域工作时，Kilo Code 检索技术文档以提供准确的指导。
*   在生成行业特定代码时，Kilo Code 参考文档中的合规要求。

使用示例[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/access-mcp-resource#%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B-1 "使用示例的链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

访问当前的天气数据：

    <access_mcp_resource><server_name>weather-server</server_name><uri>weather://san-francisco/current</uri></access_mcp_resource>

检索 API 文档：

    <access_mcp_resource><server_name>api-docs</server_name><uri>docs://payment-service/endpoints</uri></access_mcp_resource>

访问领域特定知识：

    <access_mcp_resource><server_name>knowledge-base</server_name><uri>kb://medical/terminology/common</uri></access_mcp_resource>

获取系统配置：

    <access_mcp_resource><server_name>infra-monitor</server_name><uri>config://production/database</uri></access_mcp_resource>

*   [参数](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/access-mcp-resource#%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0)
    
*   [功能](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/access-mcp-resource#%E5%8A%9F%E8%83%BD)
    
*   [使用场景](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/access-mcp-resource#%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E5%9C%BA%E6%99%AF)
    
*   [主要特性](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/access-mcp-resource#%E4%B8%BB%E8%A6%81%E7%89%B9%E6%80%A7)
    
*   [限制](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/access-mcp-resource#%E9%99%90%E5%88%B6)
    
*   [工作原理](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/access-mcp-resource#%E5%B7%A5%E4%BD%9C%E5%8E%9F%E7%90%86)
    
*   [资源类型](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/access-mcp-resource#%E8%B5%84%E6%BA%90%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B)
    
*   [使用示例](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/access-mcp-resource#%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B)
    
*   [使用示例](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/access-mcp-resource#%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B-1)
    

* * *

Is this documentation incorrect or incomplete? [Report an issue on GitHub](https://github.com/Kilo-Org/kilocode/tree/main/apps/kilocode-docs/issues/new?title=Documentation%20Issue:%20%2Fdocs%2Fzh-CN%2Ffeatures%2Ftools%2Faccess-mcp-resource)

# AI Adoption Dashboard | Kilo Code Docs

[跳转到主要内容](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/adoption-dashboard/overview#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

目录

The AI Adoption Dashboard helps engineering leaders understand how deeply and consistently their teams are using AI across development workflows. It provides a single **AI Adoption Score** (0–100) that quantifies organizational AI maturity, plus detailed breakdowns by dimension.

![Monthly view of the AI Adoption Dashboard](https://kilo.ai/docs/img/ai-adoption/adoption-dashboard.png)

Who Is It For?[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/adoption-dashboard/overview#who-is-it-for "Who Is It For?的链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This dashboard is designed for **team leads, engineering managers, and executives** who want to:

*   Track AI integration progress across their organization
*   Compare teams using a single benchmark number
*   Identify low-, medium-, and high-adoption teams
*   Quote a simple metric to stakeholders ("We're at 63; we want to be at 80")

Accessing the Dashboard[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/adoption-dashboard/overview#accessing-the-dashboard "Accessing the Dashboard的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1.  Navigate to [app.kilo.ai](https://app.kilo.ai/)
     and sign in
2.  Select your organization
3.  Click the **Usage** tab in the dashboard navigation
4.  The AI Adoption Score card appears at the top of the usage view

Dashboard Overview[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/adoption-dashboard/overview#dashboard-overview "Dashboard Overview的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Main Score Display[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/adoption-dashboard/overview#main-score-display "Main Score Display的链接")

The dashboard prominently displays your current AI Adoption Score as a percentage (e.g., "Current: 45%"). This score represents how deeply and consistently your organization uses AI across real development workflows.

### Timeline Visualization[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/adoption-dashboard/overview#timeline-visualization "Timeline Visualization的链接")

![Monthly view of the AI Adoption Dashboard](https://kilo.ai/docs/img/ai-adoption/stacked-chart.png)

A stacked bar chart shows your daily adoption scores over time. The chart uses three colors representing the score's dimensions:

*   **Blue** — Frequency (how often developers use AI)
*   **Green** — Depth (how integrated AI is into development)
*   **Orange** — Coverage (how broadly AI is adopted across the team)

### Time Period Filters[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/adoption-dashboard/overview#time-period-filters "Time Period Filters的链接")

Filter the data by selecting:

*   **Past Week** — Last 7 days
*   **Past Month** — Last 30 days
*   **Past Year** — Last 365 days
*   **All** — Complete history

### Personal vs. Organization View[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/adoption-dashboard/overview#personal-vs-organization-view "Personal vs. Organization View的链接")

Use the **"Only my usage"** toggle to switch between:

*   **Enabled** — Your individual adoption metrics
*   **Disabled** — Organization-wide adoption metrics

### Trend Indicators[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/adoption-dashboard/overview#trend-indicators "Trend Indicators的链接")

Four metric cards at the bottom of the dashboard show week-over-week changes:

*   **Total** — Overall score trend
*   **Frequency** — Changes in usage frequency
*   **Depth** — Changes in integration depth
*   **Coverage** — Changes in team-wide adoption

Each card displays the percentage change (e.g., "+2.3%" or "-1.5%") with a directional indicator.

The Three Dimensions[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/adoption-dashboard/overview#the-three-dimensions "The Three Dimensions的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The AI Adoption Score is composed of three weighted dimensions:

| Dimension | Weight | Question It Answers |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Frequency** | 40% | How often do developers use AI? |
| **Depth** | 40% | How integrated is AI into actual development? |
| **Coverage** | 20% | How broadly is AI being adopted across the team? |

Click on any dimension card to view detailed analysis and improvement suggestions specific to that dimension.

Quick Reference: Score Tiers[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/adoption-dashboard/overview#quick-reference-score-tiers "Quick Reference: Score Tiers的链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Score Range | Tier | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 0–20 | Minimal adoption | AI usage is sporadic or experimental |
| 21–50 | Early adoption | Some developers are using AI regularly |
| 51–75 | Growing adoption | AI is becoming part of team workflows |
| 76–90 | Strong adoption | AI is deeply integrated into development |
| 91–100 | AI-first engineering org | AI is central to how the team ships code |

Next Steps[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/adoption-dashboard/overview#next-steps "Next Steps的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   [Understand what each dimension measures](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/adoption-dashboard/understanding-your-score)
    
*   [Learn strategies to improve your score](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/adoption-dashboard/improving-your-score)
    
*   [Use the dashboard for team leadership](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/adoption-dashboard/for-team-leads)
    

*   [Who Is It For?](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/adoption-dashboard/overview#who-is-it-for)

    *   [Main Score Display](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/adoption-dashboard/overview#main-score-display)
        
    *   [Timeline Visualization](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/adoption-dashboard/overview#timeline-visualization)

# Managing Your Team | Kilo Code Docs

[跳转到主要内容](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/team-management#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

目录

Every person on the team is an _Owner_ or a _Member_.

Owners have full administrative oversight including billing, seat allocation, and model/provider selection.

Only Owners can conduct team management activities.

Members can use the Kilo Code extension and see data on the team's usage in the [usage dashboard](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/analytics)
.

Adding Team Members[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/team-management#adding-team-members "Adding Team Members的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1.  **Navigate to Organization Tab** in your profile page and click on the team you want to manage
2.  **Click "Invite Member"** button
3.  **Enter the team member's email address**
4.  **Select initial role** (Member or Owner)
5.  Click **Send Invitation**

![invite-member](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/a3ca0391-8a61-457f-b38b-11f03b219b4f)

Removing Team Members[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/team-management#removing-team-members "Removing Team Members的链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

When team members leave:

1.  **Navigate to Organization tab**
2.  **Find the departing member**
3.  **Click "Remove" button**
4.  **Confirm removal**
5.  **Seat becomes available** immediately

Changing Team Member Roles[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/team-management#changing-team-member-roles "Changing Team Member Roles的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Promote or demote team members as needed:

1.  **Locate team member** in Organization tab
2.  **Click role dropdown** next to their name
3.  **Select new role** (Member, Owner)
4.  **Confirm change**
5.  **Member receives email notification**

### Viewing Team Status[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/team-management#viewing-team-status "Viewing Team Status的链接")

The Organization tab shows:

*   **Active members** with last activity
*   **Pending invitations** awaiting acceptance
*   **Role distribution** across the team

Next Steps[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/team-management#next-steps "Next Steps的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   [Understand billing and credits](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/billing)
    
*   [Explore usage analytics](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/analytics)
    
*   [Learn about team roles and permissions](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/team-management)
    

Effective team management ensures your organization maximizes the benefits of AI-assisted development while maintaining cost control and security.

*   [Adding Team Members](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/team-management#adding-team-members)
    
*   [Removing Team Members](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/team-management#removing-team-members)
    
*   [Changing Team Member Roles](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/team-management#changing-team-member-roles)
    *   [Viewing Team Status](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/team-management#viewing-team-status)
        
*   [Next Steps](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/plans/team-management#next-steps)

# apply_diff | Kilo Code Docs

[跳转到主要内容](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/apply-diff#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

目录

`apply_diff`工具通过指定要替换的确切内容，对文件进行精确的修改。它使用多种复杂策略来查找和应用更改，同时保持正确的代码格式和结构。

参数[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/apply-diff#%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "参数的链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

该工具接受以下参数：

*   `path`（必填）：相对于当前工作目录要修改的文件的路径。
*   `diff`（必填）：定义更改的搜索/替换块。**对于所有当前实现的策略，diff 内容格式中必须包含行号**。

**注意**：虽然系统设计为可扩展不同的 diff 策略，但所有当前实现的策略都要求在 diff 内容本身中使用 `:start_line:` 标记指定行号。

功能[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/apply-diff#%E5%8A%9F%E8%83%BD "功能的链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

该工具使用复杂的策略对现有文件进行有针对性的更改，以精确定位和替换内容。与简单的搜索和替换不同，它使用智能匹配算法（包括模糊匹配），能够适应不同的内容类型和文件大小，并为复杂编辑提供回退机制。

使用场景[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/apply-diff#%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E5%9C%BA%E6%99%AF "使用场景的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   当Kilo Code需要对现有代码进行精确更改而不重写整个文件时。
*   在重构代码的特定部分同时保持周围上下文时。
*   以手术般的精度修复现有代码中的错误时。
*   实现仅修改文件某些部分的功能增强时。

主要特性[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/apply-diff#%E4%B8%BB%E8%A6%81%E7%89%B9%E6%80%A7 "主要特性的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   使用可配置置信度阈值（通常为0.8-1.0）的智能模糊匹配。
*   使用`BUFFER_LINES`（默认40）提供匹配的上下文。
*   采用重叠窗口方法搜索大文件。
*   自动保留代码格式和缩进。
*   组合重叠匹配以提高置信度评分。
*   在应用更改前，在diff视图中显示更改以供用户审查和编辑。
*   跟踪每个文件的连续错误（`consecutiveMistakeCountForApplyDiff`）以防止重复失败。
*   根据`.kilocodeignore`规则验证文件访问权限。
*   有效处理多行编辑。

限制[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/apply-diff#%E9%99%90%E5%88%B6 "限制的链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   对于独特、独特的代码部分效果最佳，以便可靠识别。
*   对于非常大的文件或高度重复的代码模式，性能可能会有所不同。
*   如果内容不明确，模糊匹配可能会偶尔选择错误的位置。
*   每个diff策略都有特定的格式要求。
*   复杂的编辑可能需要仔细选择策略或手动审查。

工作原理[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/apply-diff#%E5%B7%A5%E4%BD%9C%E5%8E%9F%E7%90%86 "工作原理的链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

当调用`apply_diff`工具时，它会遵循以下过程：

1.  **参数验证**：验证必需的`path`和`diff`参数。
2.  **KiloCodeIgnore检查**：验证目标文件路径是否被`.kilocodeignore`规则允许。
3.  **文件分析**：加载目标文件内容。
4.  **匹配查找**：使用所选策略的算法（精确、模糊、重叠窗口）定位目标内容，考虑置信度阈值和上下文（`BUFFER_LINES`）。
5.  **更改准备**：生成建议的更改，保留缩进。
6.  **用户交互**：
    *   在diff视图中显示更改。
    *   允许用户审查并可能编辑建议的更改。
    *   等待用户批准或拒绝。
7.  **更改应用**：如果获得批准，将更改（可能包括用户编辑）应用到文件。
8.  **错误处理**：如果发生错误（例如，匹配失败、部分应用），则递增文件的`consecutiveMistakeCountForApplyDiff`并报告失败类型。
9.  **反馈**：返回结果，包括任何用户反馈或错误详细信息。

Diff策略[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/apply-diff#diff%E7%AD%96%E7%95%A5 "Diff策略的链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Kilo Code使用以下策略来应用diff：

### MultiSearchReplaceDiffStrategy[​](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/apply-diff#multisearchreplacediffstrategy "MultiSearchReplaceDiffStrategy的链接")

一种增强的搜索/替换格式，支持在一个请求中进行多次更改。需要每个搜索块的行号。

*   **最佳使用场景**：已知或可以估计行号的多个不同更改。
*   **要求**：`SEARCH`块内容的精确匹配，包括空格和缩进。行号（`:start_line:`，`:end_line:`）是必需的。内容中的标记必须转义（`\`）。

`<diff>`块的示例格式：

    <<<<<<< SEARCH:start_line:10:end_line:12-------    // Old calculation logic    const result = value * 0.9;    return result;=======    // Updated calculation logic with logging    console.log(`Calculating for value: ${value}`);    const result = value * 0.95; // Adjusted factor    return result;>>>>>>> REPLACE<<<<<<< SEARCH:start_line:25:end_line:25-------    const defaultTimeout = 5000;=======    const defaultTimeout = 10000; // Increased timeout>>>>>>> REPLACE

*   [参数](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/apply-diff#%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0)
    
*   [功能](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/apply-diff#%E5%8A%9F%E8%83%BD)
    
*   [使用场景](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/apply-diff#%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E5%9C%BA%E6%99%AF)
    
*   [主要特性](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/apply-diff#%E4%B8%BB%E8%A6%81%E7%89%B9%E6%80%A7)
    
*   [限制](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/apply-diff#%E9%99%90%E5%88%B6)
    
*   [工作原理](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/apply-diff#%E5%B7%A5%E4%BD%9C%E5%8E%9F%E7%90%86)
    
*   [Diff策略](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/apply-diff#diff%E7%AD%96%E7%95%A5)
    *   [MultiSearchReplaceDiffStrategy](https://kilo.ai/docs/zh-CN/features/tools/apply-diff#multisearchreplacediffstrategy)
        

* * *

Is this documentation incorrect or incomplete? [Report an issue on GitHub](https://github.com/Kilo-Org/kilocode/tree/main/apps/kilocode-docs/issues/new?title=Documentation%20Issue:%20%2Fdocs%2Fzh-CN%2Ffeatures%2Ftools%2Fapply-diff)
